Mike just introduced a bill to BAN China’s TikTok –– which is anything BUT a harmless social media platform| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6e8d6c842d3941dd8a553208d40e0520&_e=EbGD2oxaQlQ1aqbbS2diPsEwqHPSgEzhkUzGDkfjDpnZ1X0jSDfXxERgsp9Py1dmBQ1ep3TkwNB2CsvWXauBVA7ONKGAcGAngbKFNCHm7c-jjiGKy01KyRXN3xvDpRELxP3065QaF0XgMx72G8e8ElDDh0mzwyY1dzclGuehBBv21YYYDfUfhlE68vpBAzHxDrrXxvWXrrltHbWMCubkF0UwAQxGK6B91mAgDR_KunQapsT_XZOzovzAiqj4NAc8)

| | **REP. GALLAGHER LEADS CHARGE TO BAN TIKTOK** _TikTok is a threat to our children’s health, our privacy, and our national security_
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION TO BAN TIKTOK**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6e8d6c842d3941dd8a553208d40e0520&_e=EbGD2oxaQlQ1aqbbS2diPsEwqHPSgEzhkUzGDkfjDpnZ1X0jSDfXxERgsp9Py1dmBQ1ep3TkwNB2CsvWXauBVMbchVyqiRR-YRA0GfV0F9rBv8XnjPwnKnbbDenkozS5tOt9VdMI-SchkfvsUr8oFeasq7w9okJJ7I6znI2Ls2upsgJhvgtVV8dL14W6TXmOudz3Mk4m61VNL3OBoAyHuny7HUxXZaIHJSjkTnAf-wXXgxEUwPvFA04RQkuRnJjR)

| | Peter, TikTok –– the Chinese Communist Party’s favorite Trojan Horse –– should have been banned _years_ ago. Sure, it looks like a harmless social media platform on the outside, but one look at their terms and conditions reveals why we can’t wait any longer.
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6e8d6c842d3941dd8a553208d40e0520&_e=EbGD2oxaQlQ1aqbbS2diPsEwqHPSgEzhkUzGDkfjDpnZ1X0jSDfXxERgsp9Py1dmBQ1ep3TkwNB2CsvWXauBVOfL9G4eI5kvAdk44kheIkxgxu8NtIY6ZsbNVboWWgttQKPrGWUprPP6pZRPAOH9tCwJg5jve3nHgB0TVdS1B0wgPU1rR9b_cnRNmDbGD9AGopLRsyeXsDYkXeYU-xm6Q5Cl_ANsvsyq8dnSmQ0y_oDMNru0izklrDWAH0Qn23KO)
---
Peter, one of Mike’s top priorities in Congress is to make America as safe and secure as possible against adversaries like China. But as long as TikTok is downloaded on millions of Americans’ phones, the CCP will continue to illegally collect our sensitive personal data, keep our children addicted, and so much more –– all putting our country in a vulnerable position. **Mike is taking action by calling on Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers to ban TikTok on government devices and introducing a bill to BAN TikTok.** _[**_Will you stand with Mike by adding YOUR name to the petition?_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6e8d6c842d3941dd8a553208d40e0520&_e=EbGD2oxaQlQ1aqbbS2diPsEwqHPSgEzhkUzGDkfjDpnZ1X0jSDfXxERgsp9Py1dmBQ1ep3TkwNB2CsvWXauBVBhW3iDDkFgU2pdqNpcP-L_vF0URZW3xKmH7C6-AqZJeBmNbaqs9SDwEyErczzxeQg9DKLfxbdQmB6xnj7b_-GdpBxSia0AmyXOPJjoO1M0ftLh-8VitjGY1RRRugl4Bx2Lg5ti5R2-6i2W3lmR530O6HG3945a0nNqwT4wKk7J5)_ Thank you,Team Gallagher

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55687830/382485208/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjNmNmNjMi05MTc2LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MQTh-8Ya3nwNtDqW6vj5yBxFU1lGfvafRNg1LofPd8=&emci=29752297-9076-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=e23f6cc2-9176-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=7731215)

| | We did it! **Senator Raphael Warnock has been reelected in Georgia.** Rev. Warnock stepped up in 2020 and narrowly won a critical seat, and became the 50th vote in the Democratic majority. Now, after John Fetterman's victory in Pennsylvania, Warnock's victory makes him our 51st vote. **51 seats is going to make a huge difference.** It means that committees in the Senate will no longer be equally divided, so we can advance more legislation. And it means we'll have, as President Obama said, "more breathing room" and "it prevents one person from holding up everything." Sen. Warnock's victory is the final victory of a 2022 campaign that proved once again that when grassroots activists like you step up, Democrats win. **Here's what Team Merkley did in this election:** → Members of Team Merkley made 33,420 grassroots donations, averaging just $31 each. Those $5 and $10 and $35 donations added up — together we contributed over _one million dollars_ into Oregon and Senate races. Over $200,000 of that was directly into state party door-knocking other voter contacts in Oregon. → Team Merkley, along with volunteers across Oregon, wrote 44,022 letters in support of Raphael Warnock, John Fetterman, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, and many others. And thanks to our generous grassroots supporters, we were able to supply stamps and envelopes for local volunteers to write letters to voters. → And so many Team Merkley volunteers made thousands of calls to voters and knocked on countless doors here in Oregon and around the country. **We bucked history by holding the Senate in a midterm. We won a very tight Oregon governor's race and two open House seats. YOU did this!** I will be forever grateful that you recognized all that was on the line this election and got involved by volunteering, donating, and just plain showing up. **Your work showed that progressives win together when we fight hard together.** I'm hopeful that you'll continue fighting with us as we look ahead to elections in 2024. We'll be facing an _even more_ challenging Senate map. We'll also have the opportunity to flip the House back into Democratic hands. And we'll be defending the White House from Donald Trump or some other MAGA Republican. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | body:
Make your voice heard.

---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4a2dd5743544bbe813b705c2ec74012&_e=YtVYY0DMZMkmJYEsZH5Ue3qJI9nOgsZozyPlEjpxl5WrfykRN4A0BKBGhdpaHbEuIt0k3WMOxxr9UmWE6yaLteTlPYhPJ90dagx_HuJuZEJ9umvOZdV8M6QCbqQJnBSU8T-5vvhjWts2IfSjmhRnnFE1QQzGz5-ddXjXSL5fmaVeNXMsmg140EKmKBXvDBy907SKLzorb_DjBpzv8M4ep7-n6KsyJu3n0hFvbK4q_aU2TJ7X4KXjwwFUT4Ior1q5uSQrWtkcTyeDL_zVrRw6o6BeQjxGE3Np8mV0CdFQs_2ePgSI_xIDnbPLhIyeXPOvWpKUw_k6kdZzWn0UfXiuFVDyOGPofk7iQAtC9dXG2Yi6RkK8-4nAhNuJnITBNgurIYQHOE0UfYnYDOjcYrof0Vd2Kg6P1N8wq471IHFIdJXFhcf81BmA1pnE1Fb5IZseezMJtDnUkiLcMgCccIeu2Q%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

**We need to hear from YOU.**

With 2022 coming to a close, the Republican Party is reaching out to Patriots across the country with a very special [**December Audit,** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4a2dd5743544bbe813b705c2ec74012&_e=YtVYY0DMZMkmJYEsZH5Ue3qJI9nOgsZozyPlEjpxl5WrfykRN4A0BKBGhdpaHbEuIt0k3WMOxxr9UmWE6yaLteTlPYhPJ90dagx_HuJuZEJ9umvOZdV8M6QCbqQJnBSU8T-5vvhjWts2IfSjmhRnnFE1QQzGz5-ddXjXSL5fmaVeNXMsmg140EKmKBXvDBy907SKLzorb_DjBpzv8M4ep7-n6KsyJu3n0hFvbK4q_aU2TJ7X4KXjwwFUT4Ior1q5uSQrWtkcTyeDL_zVrRw6o6BeQjxGE3Np8mV0CdFQs_2ePgSI_xIDnbPLhIyeXPOvo2KBGs3Ry-Rf0ccQtyYTK5xDkO0VvIeisChOTzU1hiQ9KqAgjhFN9BK6VEpuhZtOYy222R_KbNYknRgAgHRpJua6MlpUfFf-2Ll52ZKBSolK9SSAKQ45Q-aKhKLsdXmz4ZdDYHrzqTThdG9cIBSv6g%3D%3D) and we want to hear from you FIRST.

According to our records, you are one of our TOP supporters in your ZIP code, so it’s critical that we receive your response BEFORE the deadline.

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: Thank you for being on Team Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We did it!
| | |
---
We did it!
Thank you so much for being on Team Warnock and putting your trust in me. To God be the glory!
I am a proud son of Savannah, Georgia, a coastal city known for its cobblestone streets, verdant town squares, and towering oak trees covered in gray Spanish moss. And like those oak trees, my roots go deep down and stretch wide in the soil of Waycross, Burke County, and Screven County. In a sense, I am Georgia – a living example and embodiment of its history and its hope, of its pain and promise, the brutality and possibility.
I am grateful that my mother, Pastor Verlene Warnock, could be with us last night at our victory party in Atlanta. As a teenager growing up in Waycross, GA, she used to pick somebody else’s cotton and tobacco. Once again in this runoff election, she helped pick her youngest son to be a United States senator. My late father, Rev. Jonathan Warnock, a preacher and a junkman, has long entered into the light, but he too is cheering us on.
**Now, there will be folks across the country who will point to our victory and try to use it to argue that there is no voter suppression in Georgia.**
Let me be clear. The fact that millions of Georgians endured hours in lines – and were willing to spend hours in line – lines that wrapped around buildings and went on for blocks, lines in the cold, lines in the rain, is most certainly not a sign voter suppression does not exist.
Instead, it is proof that the people will not allow their voices to be silenced. And I am proud to stand with you.
I believe that democracy is the political enactment of a spiritual idea. The notion that each of us has within us a spark of the divine – we all have value. And if we have value, we ought to have a voice.
Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike should all be able to agree that no matter what neighborhood you live in, you should have the same ability to exercise your right to vote.
As I return to serve as your Senator for another six years, it's that combination of faith, love, and hard work that will keep me focused on making change on behalf of our State and our country.
Some of you have heard me tell the story many times of how my dad would wake me up every morning at 6 a.m., no matter what time of year, no matter what day of the week, he’d say “Son, get dressed, put your shoes on.”
Well Georgia, I’m up, I’m dressed, I’m ready and I’ve got my shoes on. And I am so honored that you have placed your confidence in me one more time.
From the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! God bless you, God bless this team.
Keep the faith! Keep looking up.

Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=5n9QY%2FxCQ1ekxJseXZbeM62R78%2B%2B3Vq6R1VFHeu%2BWBsjPyzNEP3FoWq3wuQASm%2BwwPzlZZMaJM8mb7O19EzJcDEXQ4S0boam0XNNwgcnFy4YsGAjx79ZbzwNuv%2FWsP5nZB0x8ziIeo8zScRhUjTJisBDhW7yAQaIaYgSH4KKJvm7HEFwAgzWe2v7suoD0OBcJGuhrG5liPR%2BPAbRyHDvo%2F5AesCmsbWD1YqJGBBk4YNAVk%2BMVg6tSrXmKVTlRbYX51H7GkkVDp4eYAqRegbDytA4OZqLF4p%2F%2BuZ30KfVcvcGfJwpO9fgR2ncODGd3%2B6JDQgbH9YNoQ12sdeNPW8u3kebAT5AjQ%2BZFeKjS9q%2FFgDXvxi6KkEy3Mmx9qUt1FNuQE0CiQkrgMYmF5DVWSrwwa47OoSUNBc9%2F%2BG6AKTWUS8%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click here: https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/m_qH6NifTkGfa_6TrGyeJw2. | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.

---
| **Pastors For Trump Launches, Backed by Faith Leaders With 200k Congregants** **Pastor, Businessman, and former Oklahoma United States Senate candidate Jackson Lahmeyer has started a nationwide effort to connect Christian faith leaders with the America First movement helping to secure another term for President Donald J. Trump in 2024.** **TULSA, Okla., Dec. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --** Counting a chapter in each state and the backing of dozens of Christian pastors with over 200,000 congregants, Pastors for Trump (PFT) is aiming to galvanize support in the evangelical community for President Trump as he seeks to return to the White House as Commander-in-Chief in 2024. Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer created the coalition to help recognize the efforts of millions of Christians across the United States in the political process and to provide a way to advocate for issues central to the faithful including the importance of life, marriage, freedom of speech, and personal responsibility. Pastor Lahmeyer is currently the Lead Pastor for Sheridan Church in Tulsa. Lahmeyer attended Oral Roberts University (ORU) and graduated Magna Cum Laude with a B.A. & M.A. in Theological & Historical Studies. Lahmeyer was Crusade Director for Christ for All Nations, which is the ministry of Reinhard Bonnke, a ministry that has helped lead 74 million people to Christ since 1974. Lahmeyer also served as the Oklahoma State Coordinator for the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association leading more than 300 churches across Oklahoma to get engaged and fight for conservative values. In 2021-2022, Lahmeyer was a candidate for the United States Senate in Oklahoma and received endorsements from many America First Patriots including Roger Stone, Rudy Giuliani, John Paul Mac Isaac and Sebastian Gorka. "_President Trump made it clear during his 2016 campaign for President of the United States that he was committed to bringing Christian leaders into the fold. During his historic first term, he proved that he would deliver on the promises he made. Heading into 2024, it is more important now than ever to reaffirm the strength of the Christian faith and our willingness to support President Trump in his fight to return to the Oval Office_ ," explained Lahmeyer. Lahmeyer is joined by Pastor Craig Hagan, who is co-Pastor of Rhema Bible Church and Chief Operating Officer For Keith Hagin Ministries and Pastor Mark Burns, Co-Founder & CEO of The NOW Television Network, a Christian television network based out of South Carolina reaches 11 Million Homes named by Time Magazine as "Trump Pastor." Hagin and Burns will serve on the Board of Directors for Pastors for Trump. PFT has a monthly prayer call, daily prayer requests, and allows all Americans to voice the issues most important to their Christian faith that they want to see influence public policy in the coming months. Pastors looking to join PFT can visit [Pastors4Trump.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=oq333kt1z0k3oto9wy&linkid=1&link=380597b5c89547eb9d45b0dbf808ad43) to fill out an application and receive regular updates. To learn more about Pastors for Trump or to schedule an interview with Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer, please contact [Kristin Davis](mailto:kristin@thinkrightpr.com). **[www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=oq333kt1z0k3oto9wy&linkid=3&link=3c1ebab8257649dfa0314f7e75eb5ae6)**

Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer created the coalition to help recognize the efforts of millions of Christians across the United States in the political process and to provide a way to advocate for issues central to the faithful including the importance of life, marriage, freedom of speech, and personal responsibility. All you have to do is follow the link below to watch this NEW video about my Presidential Announcement. The Washington Establishment wants to silence us, but we will not let them. What we have built together over the past six years is the greatest movement in history - because it is not about politics, it is about our love for America. name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7561%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=fPIrIzJz2Q1eknhCMt8QdA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96606%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LphvJAdsxOuyFZD7jE2o%2bw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96607%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yZJs1kvxVD7DuZLZrtAYJQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96608%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rlvkVBFGDxVMNyhYA3e5Yg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96609%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bN7o0spBzOEvdpWd7N11Qw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7561%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=fPIrIzJz2Q1eknhCMt8QdA&sysid=1)_

name: National Rifle Association
subject: Joe Biden wants to take your guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Help us defend the Second Amendment | Joe Biden has made it clear: he's NOT JOKING about taking your guns away.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)

_**["We're the good guys with guns... and we're NRA members too."](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)**_
\- Jack Wilson, stopped Church Shooter in White Settlement, TX

Peter,

**Joe Biden has made it clear:_he's NOT JOKING about taking your guns away._**

Just a few weeks ago, he went on national television and said he's going to **BAN** so-called "assault weapons" or commonly owned semi-auto rifles. In August, the Democrat-controlled Congress passed a bill that would outlaw thousands of firearms simply by their appearance.

Biden's proposals to take away your guns are an unconstitutional attack on the American people's protected rights, and we need to do everything in our power to fight back. _That's why we're reaching out to you, Peter, to contribute TODAY._

As long as Joe Biden's gun-grabbing administration is in the White House, the Second Amendment will remain under siege. _It's up to us to defend it._
**[DEFEND THE SECOND AMENDMENT»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)**
_The Democrats are determined to pass more anti-gun legislation, and they know they need to do it NOW before a pro-2A Republican takes back the White House in 2024._During these next two years, we need to HOLD THE LINE and stay strong in defending freedom and rejecting government tyranny.__

**The NRA will fight the Biden administration with everything we have, but we can't do it alone.**

**_That's why we need YOU, Peter, to chip in TODAY to help oppose Joe Biden and defend the Second Amendment._**

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to stand up to the gun-grabbing Left and DEFEND THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)

Despite the Left's best efforts, _we know their agenda is about stripping law-abiding Americans of their civil liberties and freedoms._

Every contribution to our **Official Second Amendment Defense Fundraising Goal** will ensure that the Left's pursuit of abolishing our right to bear arms ends in failure. There's no reason why law-abiding gun owners should have to surrender their rights to the government. Not now, not ever.

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to help us fight to DEFEND THE SECOND AMENDMENT ahead of Joe Biden's next push to take our guns.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62043531:J3rR3oGNE:m:1:3253819041:300AA6B4053D248D2D29A3CC180F6F08:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

name: Pete Sepp
subject: The biggest threat to America
body:
No one is talking about the biggest threat to national security in America’s history — the national debt.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9gkaqtsi9ol158b0vvsoibg8c3ln3jejepo3p28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6cdh2bs)
Friend,

No one is talking about the biggest threat to national security in America's history -- the national debt.

In the last 15 years, America's national debt has skyrocketed.

An incredible 70% of that $31 trillion debt load was accumulated from the start of the fiscal year (FY) 2008, October 1, 2007, through FY 2022, September 30, 2022.

We have hit $31 trillion in gross debt faster than probably any policymaker could have imagined in 2007.

And now, _interest payments alone_ are about to exceed what the U.S. spends on the Defense Department.

**Unless we get the national debt under control, it will continue to grow and suffocate the economy. **

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. We are the voice for taxpayers in D.C. Special interests have their lobbyists. B _**ut who is working for you as a taxpayer?**_ The answer -- the National Taxpayers Union.

Our team is working to convince Congress to rein in out-of-control government spending and get the national debt under control. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to support our fight.

[_**Can I count on you to helps us lobby Congress and REVERSE this trend? Please send your urgent gift today by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zonl89jv3np71oq304llsmvpjjpuebeodkcdrc58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6cdh2bs)

The national debt has been growing at an unsustainable rate, Friend.

And there are numerous consequences that come with unmanageable debt loads.

* Rising interest rates will require **higher interest payments on existing debt** by the U.S. government, and interest payments on existing debt will eat up a larger and larger share of revenues the government brings in.

* Increasing government debt crowds out private sector investment, _" which would result in lower business investment and slow the growth of economic output over time,"_ according to Congress's own budget office.

* Investors may lose confidence in the U.S. government's ability to pay its bills, increasing the risk of a flight from U.S. debt which would **raise borrowing costs** for the federal government even further.

* Rising debt makes it **more difficult for U.S. policymakers to react to future economic and fiscal shocks** , such as recessions, military conflicts, natural disasters, and public health crises.

It's time to tell Congress to tap the brakes, before $31 trillion seems as small in the future as $9 trillion seems now.

[_**A donation of $10, $35, or even $50 has a HUGE impact on our lobbying efforts.**__**If you want to get America 's debt under control, all you have to do is send NTU a one-time gift.**__**Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ngn83va5j4kmit7bb2vfbn8cl33f2htp7vq6vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6cdh2bs)

We need lawmakers to take even modest steps toward more sustainable debt levels. And like any small first steps, once they get taken, it's easier for others to follow, until pretty soon, we're making real progress. But unless Congress gets moving, the chance greatly increases that the U.S. will experience another federal debt crisis at some point in coming years.

This is where NTU plays a critical role.

Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:

* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS two major defeats in the Supreme Court.

And with your help, NTU can add reining in the national debt as our next victory.

Can I count on you to join the fight today? **Click below to donate. **

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z739jch5s6jcm75uam7k7b3r9l685kms7g6cokn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6cdh2bs)

clean_body: No one is talking about the biggest threat to national security in America’s history — the national debt. Friend, No one is talking about the biggest threat to national security in America's history -- the national debt. In the last 15 years, America's national debt has skyrocketed. An incredible 70% of that $31 trillion debt load was accumulated from the start of the fiscal year (FY) 2008, October 1, 2007, through FY 2022, September 30, 2022. We have hit $31 trillion in gross debt faster than probably any policymaker could have imagined in 2007. And now, interest payments alone are about to exceed what the U.S. spends on the Defense Department. Unless we get the national debt under control, it will continue to grow and suffocate the economy. My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. We are the voice for taxpayers in D.C. Special interests have their lobbyists. B ut who is working for you as a taxpayer? The answer -- the National Taxpayers Union. Our team is working to convince Congress to rein in out-of-control government spending and get the national debt under control. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to support our fight. The national debt has been growing at an unsustainable rate, Friend. And there are numerous consequences that come with unmanageable debt loads. Rising interest rates will require higher interest payments on existing debt by the U.S. government, and interest payments on existing debt will eat up a larger and larger share of revenues the government brings in. Increasing government debt crowds out private sector investment, " which would result in lower business investment and slow the growth of economic output over time," according to Congress's own budget office. Investors may lose confidence in the U.S. government's ability to pay its bills, increasing the risk of a flight from U.S. debt which would raise borrowing costs for the federal government even further. Rising debt makes it more difficult for U.S. policymakers to react to future economic and fiscal shocks , such as recessions, military conflicts, natural disasters, and public health crises. It's time to tell Congress to tap the brakes, before $31 trillion seems as small in the future as $9 trillion seems now. We need lawmakers to take even modest steps toward more sustainable debt levels. And like any small first steps, once they get taken, it's easier for others to follow, until pretty soon, we're making real progress. But unless Congress gets moving, the chance greatly increases that the U.S. will experience another federal debt crisis at some point in coming years. This is where NTU plays a critical role. Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades: We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform. In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS two major defeats in the Supreme Court. And with your help, NTU can add reining in the national debt as our next victory. Can I count on you to join the fight today? Click below to donate. Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3q462lotov9b4o4vab39jf42lastdnh0ni5rb98_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr2981q6es0re5c8sqeaj6n9vu6c9lqcsqav34mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6clh2bs)
---

---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znq71l4682qn8ep4v6cvlmucov8f7u3mk6pv1ar8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c5ieeoj6clh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Priority Gold
subject: Surprise: US Banks To Start Seizing Accounts?
body:
If the Freedom Convoy taught us anything, it’s this: Those in power will do whatever it takes to stand on the necks of freedo
# **Surprise: US Banks To Start Seizing Accounts?**

If the Freedom Convoy taught us anything, it's this:
Those in power will do _whatever_ it takes to stand on the necks of freedom-loving folks like you and me.
And that includes **seizing your bank accounts without notice.**

name: Great America Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7592%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=oMi8cNVTaOQG3lDZAdv6fg&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77304%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x0ZQOPdhsMxjE16E73YOlQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77315%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t%2fk4emwznjEXQt16ua7SSg&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77316%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E5%2f1c0vsrHM4QCabdRfxEA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77317%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o9FHsFMK2joxAcUYXQJWxA&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7592%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=oMi8cNVTaOQG3lDZAdv6fg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7592%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=oMi8cNVTaOQG3lDZAdv6fg&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkd347vv7ovip2r1f6lhpj479thnosl4b9ege2q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbiohkf2h5e7e0c6smfpn6t9fs4d1t7r452ep77o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zurca2v4ccaj5qrkp87ccup93jg3kvl9m1i6ls40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0c3h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoh85ogptniola4r57mlud9218gh4os67b2cfu50_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0c3h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day. | | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory this month. And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zik0e21ffmmuetdcc7m0v9q6698n98aa2sbkflr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlvjce87m0vctu768aeoipoqb1phrk86hatidkro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfpkacodrhoojlu0og7m4j1rr5ijgm1ecap6dvq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zv6h1u4pqphr7q774e5vjvk2rcptuvn17084f1s8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprgnmi1fq76lroh26h2uq60ugpis0cuukum3iag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg64or0cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrdl5kesvq6m1griqe3f1pivsk1135l6etb7pqn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqdilhuk2nsmulega271sdt68aopn771a6fs7gn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrpqsrtcfse5apv47hkka6fhcce8pbfhdohqljbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztd8ti8v9eo86vl4pj2rs8cb02uc9hdem9bt9dh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zijcl4bgvilcprsd7cjn1ag8d3tutsl4b8spbtco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvo79nvbhrhln38ojdjkij3ou0k7kc1el2ndfl2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlfa2tadsidn75q5b2jam36vvc1flfftco7j6aco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9e94j48f6likpqr9uooqr1urar1c46s4n91tnb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

clean_body: I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! | | | Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win \-- just in time for Christmas! While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: We’re Lost!!
body:
Who would you vote for in 2024?
Liz Cheney can’t get Republican votes, so she asks Democrats to switch their party and vote for her.
|
---
Friend,

With the 2022 elections in the rear-view mirror, it’s clear that there are more questions than answers about the direction of the Republican Party.

Will they stick with former President Donald Trump’s vision for the future...

...Or will they get behind the young rising superstar of the party Governor Ron DeSantis?

So, we thought we’d bring the question to you!

name: Border Crisis Update (from the GOP)
subject: Border towns are STRUGGLING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Help us hold Biden accountable. | Democrats in sanctuary cities are quick to decry the bussing of illegal migrants...
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj4ee7p8psohtdlbntjn98h9m74cc9agrk5qn2h8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5hemo64cdj69pm8pjjepq3cplj6epj6oj6cspb4tdlcjh6ddb26qpj4sphcljjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p70phhmspm4pti65j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeo35c1gm2p36c8iv0)

Help us hold Biden accountable. | Democrats in sanctuary cities are quick to decry the bussing of illegal migrants...
Friend,

Democrats in "sanctuary cities" are quick to decry the bussing of illegal migrants to their communities, but they're happy to let small border towns deal with them.

Unlike Joe Biden, the American People can't turn a blind eye to the border crisis. That's why the GOP is putting together a **[task force letter](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze79d2g7ppjbndnfhh42850ft8kti5gsaf2506b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)** urging Biden to acknowledge his FAILURES, and we need YOU to **[co-sign](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zopnh09qa94i9r26t1gi37j8dd7iujnv2kq30lp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)** our letter and help amplify the message.

**[Do your part to stop the Biden Border Crisis by adding your name to our task force letter IMMEDIATELY.>>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdhb8hub6e1vphgscr9vbhgjl00pu9ma8nh315ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)**

**Dear Joe Biden,

It's been nearly two years since you took office, yet you haven't even BOTHERED to visit the southern border. Meanwhile, millions of illegal immigrants and illicit drugs have flowed into our communities at alarming rates.

Your open border policies have created a humanitarian and national security crisis at our doorstep. We, the American people, deserve a leader who will put us FIRST. That's why I'm DEMANDING that you take this crisis seriously and SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER.

Sincerely,

An American Citizen**

**[CO-SIGN OUR LETTER>>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9u6s466488834eo8e9ijf52ppiofa0an7q5nh58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)**

Biden and Democrats can continue to deny the reality of the situation at the border, but thanks to the bold action of Republican Governors in border states, they can no longer ignore it.

We can hold the administration accountable and put an END to this crisis, but we need your support.

**[Co-sign the GOP's letter to Joe Biden NOW and do your part.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztp7j9903r08c0p178sd2gu2374b03qiuidojbb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)**

Thank you,

GOP HQ

**[CO-SIGN OUR LETTER>>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0u1tlb0jak3nmqiv6q7fif0kfhsjle2dl68ae2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg62ob4cph2bs)**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Here's the truth...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter,

Nancy Pelosi. Liz Cheney. Joe Biden. Adam Schiff.

None of them want the complete footage from January 6 to see the light of day.

_Why is that?_

**The regime knows the video they hid from the American people proves there was a FEDSURRECTION on January 6.**

And when the Republicans take the majority in less than one month, it's time to shut down the January 6 witch hunt and release the video, which will exonerate our patriots. [**❭❭ CHIP IN TO EXPOSE THE JANUARY 6 TRUTH ❬❬**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) **The FBI admitted they had informants on the ground that day.**

Who were they? Did they incite violence? Was this a setup to frame the MAGA movement ahead of the 2022 election?

The American people deserve answers.

_But as long as the regime keeps the January 6 video footage under lock and key, America First conservatives in Congress can 't reveal the truth_.

You and I know the January 6 witch hunt is about banning Donald Trump from running for President in 2024 and crushing the MAGA movement.

Joe Biden admitted as much in his _" gates of hell"_ speech.

**Pro-Trump Republicans must stop Democrats from rigging another election.**

And that means defusing the ability of Democrats to keep up the fake news lies about January 6.

Show all the video.

Expose the FBI informants dressed up in the crowd that day as Trump supporters.

**Figure out why Ray Epps is the one Trump supporter the regime does not want to lock up and throw away the key.**

**[But I need your help to make that happen](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r).**

Spineless RINOs would love nothing more than to _" move on"_ and stage stunts to make you think they are fighting Joe Biden.

What the establishment cannot ignore is your voice.

**_That 's why I need your help today._**

**[Please join the fight to exonerate our patriots by chipping in right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r).** [**EXPOSE THE JANUARY 6 TRUTH
CHIP IN BELOW**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61243147:W51JfCDNN:m:1:2365227053:626B54712E1D15E47EF305BBC385F3C3:r) Matt Gaetz

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0256%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bzlhRpKeqffz%2f5Lp7livtg&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42016%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5dsWazcSvLT0whviwBGCgw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42017%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uKhAjdPYZwnU7txo2VMIRQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42018%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fmnRduT2d8frkr6qT3wv7A&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42019%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yOg5tUIXPhTcihBuO6%2fr5Q&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0256%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bzlhRpKeqffz%2f5Lp7livtg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0256%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bzlhRpKeqffz%2f5Lp7livtg&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvh4eqt9669ccql4v9o9mdl6fleg632n7g5pbpg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg66oj6cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5eh00g4nbcm7ibneda0mv08a1e1iselkbbtm6dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg66oj6cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0ep23ovj24i66dn954l294vcmu45u3sbjesvuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg66oj6cjh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk9p3b11ivkks3munbe8hs250l0beo0fchflbs98_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clg66oj6cjh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Missing your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
---
Hi Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

With the House of Representatives back under Republican control, we cannot afford to relent in our fight for reproductive freedom. **That’s why I set a goal to receive 5,000 signatures on my petition to protect reproductive rights, but it looks like I’m _still_ ****missing your signature.**

Peter, I _refuse_ to sit here and do nothing while millions of people in our nation are denied essential reproductive care. I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: **Will you add your name to my reproductive freedom petition before it locks at midnight tonght?

Here’s the best link: [petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-1122-repro-right](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699001/382536961/1636200151?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=&emci=e0e7cdde-a675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=770602fb-0877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for being in this fight with me.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Subject: SIGNATURE REQUESTED: Will you sign my petition?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699002/382536962/265476937?refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=)
---
**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699003/382536963/1636200151?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=&emci=e0e7cdde-a675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=770602fb-0877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699004/382536965/1636200151?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=&emci=e0e7cdde-a675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=770602fb-0877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=25369504)
---
Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699005/382536966/1636200151?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=&emci=e0e7cdde-a675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=770602fb-0877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55699007/382536967/1636200151?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-repro-rights-1122&refcode=jtk857-su-nd&code=jtk857-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzA2MDJmYi0wODc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh5kehp8F_q4ZAaSuqhpUtI8IRcT9WuhUbiriccecl4=&emci=e0e7cdde-a675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=770602fb-0877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=25369504)

name: Marine Corps Proud
subject: It can happen here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
This is a loud warning to every Patriot in this country!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "Headline") Peter: Around the world, we're seeing what totalitarian regimes are doing to their citizens... and the Biden Administration's willful silence on their oppressive measures should send a loud warning to every Patriot in this country. China - harsh crackdowns over protesting China's "zero Covid" policies that include welding doors shut to keep citizens locked in their homes. **Yet, Biden says nothing.** Iran - Security forces killed a man whose only crime was honking in celebration of the USA's World Cup win over Iran. **Yet, Biden says nothing.** I served in the U.S. Marine Corps defending this country against brutal dictators and oppressive regimes. And I'll be damned if I'll let the U.S. turn into a dictatorship that we've fought so hard to stamp out across the world. **[That's why I'm working day and night in Congress to stop Biden from pushing his Socialist agenda... and it's why I need your help to continue this fight with your donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "That’s why I’m working day and night in Congress to
stop Biden from pushing his Socialist agenda... and it’s why I need your help to continue this fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation
today.")** I didn't successfully serve for over 40 years to reach the rank of Lt. General by allowing injustices to occur. The same is true for how I intend to lead during my fourth term in Congress. **No matter what tyranny Biden throws at us, I. WILL. NOT. BE. SILENT.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "Headline")Because the oppression and brutality you see in China, Iran, Russia, and elsewhere can happen right here in the U.S. if we don't push back against those who seek to stifle free speech, restrict religious freedom, or impose unconstitutional mandates upon us. **[That's why I need your help to defend our Constitutional freedoms from the tyranny of the Biden regime. Chip in today and help me fight back!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "That’s why I need your help to defend our Constitutional freedoms from the tyranny of the Biden regime. Chip in 50, $100, or $250 today
and help me fight back!")** I'm telling you, we can't ignore Biden's blistering silence on what's happening in China. And even more important, we can't ignore what the Chinese government is doing to its people right now. Because that's what our future holds if you do nothing to stop Biden's and the radical left's march to Marxism and attempts to stymie our military from becoming the best fighting force in the world. Our majority in the House is razor thin. That means I need all the help I can to continue the fight against the destructive policies being pushed by Biden and the Left. **[Will you chip in and help me defend our Republic? $100, $500, or even $1,000 will show the Left that people are behind me as I protect your family and mine from a Socialist takeover.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "Will you chip in and help me defend our
Republic? $100, $500, or even $1,000 will show the Left that people are behind me as I protect your family and mine from a Socialist takeover.")** The first step toward tyranny is ignorance. It's what Biden and the radical left are counting on, especially during this holiday season. **That 's why it's vital you step up RIGHT NOW and help me stand up to the Left in Washington and let them know that this old Marine General won't tolerate their wayward actions any longer.** **[Join me in this fight. Donate Today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "Join me in this fight. Donate Today!")** God Bless America,

Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62044153:JexbfoGiN:m:1:3331421248:E91EA55123E9CC41CEE09144C15C8873:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")

name: Virginia Dems
subject: All Virginians need to work together to win in SD-07
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
It’ll take all of us to block Glenn Youngkin’s 2023 legislative agenda.

|
---
Derek, Virginia is one of the most diverse states in the country. From the coastline to the bay, from Shenandoah to the Appalachian Plateau, from Southside to NOVA – Virginia is home to great variety. But our Commonwealth works best when we all work together. With the upcoming Special Election in SD-07, Democrats across Virginia need to band together to give Aaron Rouse the edge he needs to win this highly competitive seat. clean_body: It’ll take all of us to block Glenn Youngkin’s 2023 legislative agenda. | Derek, Virginia is one of the most diverse states in the country. From the coastline to the bay, from Shenandoah to the Appalachian Plateau, from Southside to NOVA – Virginia is home to great variety. But our Commonwealth works best when we all work together. With the upcoming Special Election in SD-07, Democrats across Virginia need to band together to give Aaron Rouse the edge he needs to win this highly competitive seat. That’s why we’re reaching out to you – we need Democrats from your area to chip in and help support Virginia Dems. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** With a victory for Aaron Rouse in SD-07, Democrats would add another brick in their Senate “brick wall,” and put the final nail into the coffin of Glenn Youngkin’s legislative agenda. = Virginia Dems =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. | Powhatan Christmas Parade & Tree Lighting!
---
| Greetings,
Please join me, Delegate John McGuire, and team for fun and fellowship at the Powhatan Christmas Parade this Saturday December 10.
-John McGuire supporters are invited to walk with us in the parade or ride in the trailer to wave at the crowd!
-Join Team McGuire in the Parade Lineup 2:00 pm at [Fighting Creek Park.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E7tY7xzf7emTYOBnDmQOpQdj3X_J8DolVp_1BdGts1N7NppP4GFbf4_zJw5Sabgj7sUXBYm62seqZkNnzvwKiTfZTnc9GyBvs0a5I7jWBvzr35P6b3TMbjzBPy0QD5SssjMLUiOPO5gRAsktDaO6g_JA3XyrH72RZKNO3saEaN1Sdx7K5M16qrx2KeqcAzVkTfKfLqVh1Ch851pW9e-H_Qr_5zVOI7VY&c=kep1xtK9qf7R5G53FBDZbD_JUAYSUzlvcYax6h_w0PpAppfnMaY8yw==&ch=arUuAwHiiq1KdSM3ABflCCV8akvD_1kNjL1ERm5ZwZ1C0qpddnu_Bw==)
-The Parade starts at 3:00 pm on Saturday, December 10.
-The Christmas Tree Lighting will happen immediately following the parade.
---
| Powhatan Christmas Mother: Kathy Ware

| McGuire Convention Update
---
| It was decided that we will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E7tY7xzf7emTYOBnDmQOpQdj3X_J8DolVp_1BdGts1N7NppP4GFbf8jFAWVPyr1r5w8uG5Vlje3U_aWl6PDW-f0PRjZBgUjVUrvB-8O2a1mNgaisxD1gNBfGRxtAtVMQHh6PLMCLzDER2TepEHV6Zajcf656GTG9fM55PvPKsHdAzWNCfo3JnBeb1u-qdOsXpoKA9IAGTdvb_2Qv5Rs15zyXyqAa1JcLiKQgGUEtlx4rpnWaCY8rJwTruRsxKCpR&c=kep1xtK9qf7R5G53FBDZbD_JUAYSUzlvcYax6h_w0PpAppfnMaY8yw==&ch=arUuAwHiiq1KdSM3ABflCCV8akvD_1kNjL1ERm5ZwZ1C0qpddnu_Bw==) and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP.
I respectfully ask you to forward this email/ [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E7tY7xzf7emTYOBnDmQOpQdj3X_J8DolVp_1BdGts1N7NppP4GFbf8jFAWVPyr1r5w8uG5Vlje3U_aWl6PDW-f0PRjZBgUjVUrvB-8O2a1mNgaisxD1gNBfGRxtAtVMQHh6PLMCLzDER2TepEHV6Zajcf656GTG9fM55PvPKsHdAzWNCfo3JnBeb1u-qdOsXpoKA9IAGTdvb_2Qv5Rs15zyXyqAa1JcLiKQgGUEtlx4rpnWaCY8rJwTruRsxKCpR&c=kep1xtK9qf7R5G53FBDZbD_JUAYSUzlvcYax6h_w0PpAppfnMaY8yw==&ch=arUuAwHiiq1KdSM3ABflCCV8akvD_1kNjL1ERm5ZwZ1C0qpddnu_Bw==) to family and friends in Senate District 10. This is a numbers game and we need as many delegate sign ups as possible. Thank you!
