name: Roy Cooper
subject: Medicaid expansion remains a top priority for me. Is it one you share, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Lend your support to mine.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55703659/382553581/823540626?refcode=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UyNDIyNy0xMTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tb3O3JLcnehldpLbrf_uHPxm5EQomx7mlLkSNCJqSQw=&emci=910e5520-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, One of my top priorities as Governor is making sure North Carolinians have the resources and opportunities they need to succeed. **One resource that every last one of us deserves is affordable, high-quality health care — and I’ve made it my mission to make that care more accessible by expanding Medicaid.** Republican legislative leaders for years have blocked Medicaid Expansion, even going so far as suing me as we tried to move it forward. Now they say they are for it, but they still haven’t brought it to a vote. By expanding Medicaid access in our state, just like 39 states and D.C. have already, 600,000 more North Carolinians could get covered. **And for every month we don’t pass the expansion, our state actually _loses_ $521 million. That is as cruel as it is irresponsible.** _We just can’t let it stand._ We all know that keeping folks healthy is good for our communities, good for our economy, and simply the right thing to do. **[If you agree, I need you to sign my petition calling for all our state legislators to unite in support of Medicaid expansion today. I’d like to see at least 500 signatures by tomorrow!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55703660/382553582/1949442151?refcode=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UyNDIyNy0xMTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tb3O3JLcnehldpLbrf_uHPxm5EQomx7mlLkSNCJqSQw=&emci=910e5520-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)** | ****[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55703661/382553583/1949442151?refcode=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UyNDIyNy0xMTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tb3O3JLcnehldpLbrf_uHPxm5EQomx7mlLkSNCJqSQw=&emci=910e5520-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=37e24227-1177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)****

Thank you for joining with me in support of such a critical investment in North Carolina’s future.
Roy

clean_body: Lend your support to mine. | Hi Peter, One of my top priorities as Governor is making sure North Carolinians have the resources and opportunities they need to succeed. One resource that every last one of us deserves is affordable, high-quality health care — and I’ve made it my mission to make that care more accessible by expanding Medicaid. Republican legislative leaders for years have blocked Medicaid Expansion, even going so far as suing me as we tried to move it forward. Now they say they are for it, but they still haven’t brought it to a vote. By expanding Medicaid access in our state, just like 39 states and D.C. have already, 600,000 more North Carolinians could get covered. And for every month we don’t pass the expansion, our state actually loses $521 million. That is as cruel as it is irresponsible. We just can’t let it stand. We all know that keeping folks healthy is good for our communities, good for our economy, and simply the right thing to do. | ** Thank you for joining with me in support of such a critical investment in North Carolina’s future. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=50801496ae1f47e8bff8efd13c376120&_e=4JxpTX-R0oYRnmv8yEWIf-tcmmo7cGmC8eEBzda3eYG1S6NeiQvSEOGM8gGX2YGvKeTU9WzoeitxW4Vulycuj9iU8DzQL-yAhD65bSEfUWwkpb74AXs9SoxWhrQxKWQs2GgeXL8ZqK6N5nbIFlrlxebc00XtEYPzFYqdhGU-dE8klXE4FeQ38IdAvpaFSnN7CUeJqb3KddlEoxoyXKV5r53sQJJ92r8SaFe9folSrPZCISKlcpomeQwV5r79MtA6_kwVc3rCQOCEKcC46A52tqMaKEfVS92YFuScdm2OOkyKYFI-zsey83Bh1MrC8sX6GfsTXhCnEMur_XDO_Sm3WIYVifTMu82LiCBGNN7j8NBnLuo1NxCI_iVuKSEIMGyzHvTRj93uD0GharnVOrUhJg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=50801496ae1f47e8bff8efd13c376120&_e=4JxpTX-R0oYRnmv8yEWIf-tcmmo7cGmC8eEBzda3eYG1S6NeiQvSEOGM8gGX2YGvKeTU9WzoeitxW4Vulycuj9iU8DzQL-yAhD65bSEfUWwkpb74AXs9SoxWhrQxKWQs2GgeXL8ZqK6N5nbIFlrlxebc00XtEYPzFYqdhGU-dE8klXE4FeQ38IdAvpaFSnN7CUeJqb3KddlEoxoyXKV5r53sQJJ92r8SaFe9folSrPZzIhM35LpEg3Y81evjTazlivZURbxvwVq7iN-d2SI9zJq7j5b9PBI2zr5EuKxLHBq8Vi2E02-RpseLHDUdEUjsiTV98Lo-NGJcUefkO2OYcsYGkakBZFHNr2FDRWtnfhtXmsmp2cYigZayeAcPaSy0bKEJhycmB2Wx_wnl56O3rA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=50801496ae1f47e8bff8efd13c376120&_e=4JxpTX-R0oYRnmv8yEWIf-tcmmo7cGmC8eEBzda3eYG1S6NeiQvSEOGM8gGX2YGvKeTU9WzoeitxW4Vulycuj9iU8DzQL-yAhD65bSEfUWwkpb74AXs9SoxWhrQxKWQs2GgeXL8ZqK6N5nbIFlrlxebc00XtEYPzFYqdhGU-dE8klXE4FeQ38IdAvpaFSnN7CUeJqb3KddlEoxoyXKV5r53sQJJ92r8SaFe9folSrPbLHoB_QN5zikto9FqCuqrksBbxy06O4GxlZAYvSGs19J_USIGH2jzPM_uSJRzvN9zZW6zwMYFLR7WhYEDZ0ZSunuWxqKusupoQ4Jifa6qtlJUu_9YAWLQLA0V3ymKfw542nVrP5mw3Rfa1lhWqT-DlH596GAvhiaA2uD_zgWcn6A%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=50801496ae1f47e8bff8efd13c376120&_t=nu99q85kikMLvh5TswBZzCL4--U6wRnWsidy7A8cylBO5SPtPOGxvfrPEXTynvqpwHec76z7VmZAajy9fQCtWWwH1rogvtynUgq_1qvHSD4%3D)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: It’s official: democracy won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

With the defeat of U.S. Senate candidate Herschel Walker in Georgia earlier this week, one thing is clear: **Voters flatly rejected election deniers across the country.** Out of 94 races for governor, secretary of state, and attorney general, only 14 election deniers were elected into office or won re-election. In secretary of state races, where these positions oversee, defend, and certify elections—voters rejected 8 of the 10 election deniers running. In congressional races, over 100 Republicans who denied the 2020 election lost their elections. Republican Accountability PAC’s work persuading traditional Republican voters to vote against these anti-democracy candidates was also a deciding factor in why the midterms were bad for election deniers. [**I said as much in a recent CNN interview:**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWx1wv8M8q6PW3Fz7RN3D7XX7VcSh174Tk1WXN1f4_YS3q90_V1-WJV7CgCDyW2vCBPH2KQC1tN30-yXP-P10qVrx4dV6NQMRYW8WRnTW3R0CW9V9Tpwl4GfNvMW4w4Vvn10RplSW1j4B1p8phDq9W1VQtQX8HpbRxW3RLpdn5lSYwVN5xx9LJgJMyKN88lqyK9WBctW2CCpYJ68ZJPfW8MBSv83qWQ8kW5McdhW75qg8RW5h4rj35K5F8qW2Zk3mR6YlHc6N1PQddRfKz_cW1CX3t96N-DPdW1R5v-z8HBLYsMXwcltpB7NYW1Z-nzz5TZmv5W2S41Xl71snJQW5qpPp8995n44W544md75fN-h2W2H0p1j94dxrvN5Vq9yKl7hg5W8Xd8p36SWC0LVlTLfJ53S0mjW7Q-7fS3RCdr4W813jRr6Jlt-Q3j0X1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWx1wv8M8q6PW3Fz7RN3D7XX7VcSh174Tk1WXN1f4_YS3q90_V1-WJV7CgLVKW592z8L7H47vFW81_97M7tS9_TW8jfrpY6v0wd-W5JsQQp6Sp7NzN1W1_nkVQq6xW7LG0Nj9dbDB3N6SD2Tk75BwVW1nfXvk4LMdtfW1BMBYf13wX4mVTnWzj8ZMrDBW1Vhb7d5jKm34V289sY4drwqrW49PNkW6n76QNW1fpQQd1DvVF-W6ng5yQ5s_7sJW5K6RDG837v6_W2CJ38S2V9zjcVdS0ZL4N0NttW3rMft35hmq37W4T691C89lQf8N2kD01ZR9WgLW3C5dqL7NH7TzW1pVZ2b8QrDfCW8MnYzH8LfBhgW8bYq7s85G5pVW8hZW2X56-mTTW5pztvx3yjKfhW6wq9c28GyJ9LVPyGTL45tVgtW4cX7kJ5Gn-hg2_n1)
---
Many of these election deniers who lost were running in swing states and would have held key positions like governor or secretary of state heading into 2024. I know voters heard the same conspiracy theories coming from these candidates that I did. Even for many loyal Republicans, it was just too much to bear.
##
**This is a clear win for democracy and a major blow to the anti-democratic MAGA movement, but the fight isn’t over yet.** Trump is still in the picture with a firm grip on the Republican Party. He’s still spreading lies about our elections. And the party still embraces all kinds of extremists, cranks, and conspiracy theorists.
##
That’s why we can’t get complacent.
##
We’ll be keeping the fight for democracy alive in the new year, and we hope you’ll continue to stand with us against election deniers. Your support is instrumental in strengthening our institutions and democracy against those who wish to undermine it.
##
Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC
---
| Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 [Unsubscribe](https://hs-6772164.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe-all?languagePreference=en&d=VndxGl6gCNV4VMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fVqNN806ZHcmWFd6W6xPVtx6jtSM2V25B408yv9wLN6CjCC1WCWb6N5pFytsXk_7QVbwbjC9dx_KJW1B3rkV4WYjrhw2cGqC0pjb2&v=3&utm_campaign=RAPAC%20Email%20Rentals&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=237155833&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--ixwHD6HOVUDunfTIjMM49hU1oI49WVtXkYbMWJkKAX5y4tAaerXGHVNl7OJHTzT2mElNMayFFGhEGFtoZdOUFdsCAJA&_hsmi=237155833) [Manage preferences](https://hs-6772164.s.hubspotemail.net/hs/manage-preferences/unsubscribe?languagePreference=en&d=VndxGl6gCNV4VMdLpS3T0vFpW4ckpnd3P3Q7wW3ZsjYm3_fVqNN806ZHcmWFd6W6xPVtx6jtSM2V25B408yv9wLN6CjCC1WCWb6N5pFytsXk_7QVbwbjC9dx_KJW1B3rkV4WYjrhw2cGqC0pjb2&v=3&utm_campaign=RAPAC%20Email%20Rentals&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=237155833&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--ixwHD6HOVUDunfTIjMM49hU1oI49WVtXkYbMWJkKAX5y4tAaerXGHVNl7OJHTzT2mElNMayFFGhEGFtoZdOUFdsCAJA&_hsmi=237155833)

name: Team Veronica
subject: ‼️Big, BIG news from Veronica in DC this week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Huge news, friend — Veronica was just elected co-chair of the Democratic Policy and Communications Committee!

The DPCC sets the policy priorities and messaging for the entire Democratic party.

That means El Paso will have a voice at the highest levels of Democratic leadership.

And, Veronica wasn't the only trailblazer elected to Democratic leadership.

Rep. Hakeem Jeffries became the first Black party leader in House history. And Rep. Lauren Underwood is the first Black woman elected to House leadership since Shirley Chisholm.

Together with Veronica, they're part of a new generation of Democratic leaders, who are elevating the voices of women, people of color, and working Americans.

There's no one we'd rather have in this position than Veronica, friend. As DPCC co-chair, she'll make sure that Congress is doing everything in its power to fight for us.

Support Veronica's work → [secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode2=8376cf32-1277-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=221208_team_DPCC_b1]

Thank you so much for being part of this team, friend.

- Team Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?
Contribute Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ve_email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=8376cf32-1277-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474]

clean_body: [] Huge news, friend — Veronica was just elected co-chair of the Democratic Policy and Communications Committee! The DPCC sets the policy priorities and messaging for the entire Democratic party. That means El Paso will have a voice at the highest levels of Democratic leadership. And, Veronica wasn't the only trailblazer elected to Democratic leadership. Rep. Hakeem Jeffries became the first Black party leader in House history. And Rep. Lauren Underwood is the first Black woman elected to House leadership since Shirley Chisholm. Together with Veronica, they're part of a new generation of Democratic leaders, who are elevating the voices of women, people of color, and working Americans. There's no one we'd rather have in this position than Veronica, friend. As DPCC co-chair, she'll make sure that Congress is doing everything in its power to fight for us. Support Veronica's work → [secure.actblue.com/donate/veemail?refcode2=8376cf32-1277-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=221208teamDPCCb1] Thank you so much for being part of this team, friend. - Team Veronica Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica? name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqj8quvkl7lqheoe6jonaj6sa6kf062db3kcva08_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9h6ti36shle2qb2srk6loncsjl6do75dhi6urm3cjlc5im2d9lekqbfcbjc9rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p70phhmipm8dtim9j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeo35chim4oj1c8iv0)

*Sponsored Message*
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgkj5v31ajq0t9hbp6c6nrq6lalj9qs75f602dh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6aoj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zud9vc5crvftfq3955ount1bdgoil3p0ohomg6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6aoj2c5h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs31dptctnu53rr2vm6fv4dinpr4fjkao9rb6be0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6aoj2c5h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](https://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2z9k0k1vslu0takq6vq80fk6d0j7j5kohqo0v550o).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zha5easge6bevt71ctsvihvha6ff0pb60fo1tdb0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1im8pb2c9gm49fg)

subject: An election denier might still be the next attorney general of Arizona, a state that’s been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. We must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes.
body:
Open recount in Arizona
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9976285-fadd-43dc-84cf-68cb8efeb9df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_After a looooong election season ... there’s one more Big Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, but we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. [_**But, to finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26e1314d-8a96-412f-8350-974fac81c1d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b24d4eb-4b65-4414-9800-48b2dfd8ce18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1006e565-af96-4e72-913f-c7e5802f68c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: American Firearms Association
subject: [ALERT] Tuesday’s Results Mean Gun Rights will be Abolished
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from
being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "Even the complete seizure of
the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "Save the Second Amendment today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62045883:Jia3MoG4N:m:1:3331703221:F89668B80F4DAD3B3C2241CEC4818D4A:r "PROTECT THE
2A!")
---

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4dal9nvavsipu4iqo4rm82a40kcgjj9qm14j7ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc235q3tnu8ehr3vg4jgttqn862g8eoq15t3ucg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6aem1nrp8i26hor5905tp21pqbbr0l9n273gimo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpfu02s022f0skt4kd2ppgpf8c3muc089tqpc0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu4r9usaagd1s6vt7dmuaaibd80jdh52vl0pgago_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3kbrvi1j8jcchce0nghivbmjnm9msps1mvms838_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6upurs82bdpdmpk24r26udgac3lgcs2jek7q8io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8lhtejlnmbs21icjb4i252gjnd6petab5hrhjlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztb00fo7r2a5aj5paat2963hegmg0n1hja2pt4cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi23qgqkj4n0csfod9fish6hq8cir9pgq1e7qpt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6eo32cjh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zk7m4grrnl295v788so4ur2idsuo9gosa1rbt958).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zss4rc76a1m9gkkmvppv1ihtqivefldmilmsf73o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1im8pr0c9ie49fg)

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8lcvvmq44j4pv97r9t2b80j7gnuuf6ok9rnuc8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmejncec7hkuc1mj21s5hhaii535fbufccf4c238_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeub15mpdubue9b5921agikopajj08ar5uoftogo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrouoii9470a9elase85uv2um095ohf0tkpp4q60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z69o9t39rs7jsttjolqnv4s8n29kauk0eu1uioa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0d9jm33a25odlj8lops75tek7ppfe367eldk78o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znc8urs19iv7orh51g189ic4pu5qcn503e747li8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zao2uhe1lhdenaavi0t9a5q2275ndqu20j8t15h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zel51bm4lgifgcupeka8dm981b279u01n1e5ajfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqr1q96klgqbgabj936lsdq0ks01fuu6abk793b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cli6ep74chh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? name: Team Casar
subject: BREAKING: Greg Casar named the Progressive Caucus Whip
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Greg is honored to be the youngest-ever member ever to serve in this critical leadership role in the Progressive Caucus.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55715040/382574765/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRlMjk0OS0xZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-omTBLSU5piWElngW85fseZbTQyWBGTq_x4AYI4XA0=&emci=795b20ba-1877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d04e2949-1d77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)
**This is huge, Peter. Greg has just been elected as the Congressional Progressive Caucus Whip, the #3 position in the Progressive Caucus!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55715041/382574766/-1765736522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRlMjk0OS0xZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-omTBLSU5piWElngW85fseZbTQyWBGTq_x4AYI4XA0=)
Greg will be the youngest-ever member ever to serve in this critical leadership role in the Progressive Caucus. He’ll be leading the 103-member body alongside Rep. Pramila Jayapal as Chair and Rep. Ilhan Omar as Deputy Chair.
_**Wait, what does it mean to be the Whip?**_
A “Whip” is the organizer and coordinator of other elected officials. Greg’s job will be to make sure all 103 members of the Progressive Caucus are aligned on values, votes, and goals to have the greatest impact. The Whip also serves on the executive committee for the caucus.
_**Why do we need a person to do that?**_
With more progressives in Congress than ever before, and only a slim Republican majority, coordination amongst progressives will be key to:
1. Block extremist attacks on working families
2. Aggressively push for transformative civil rights policies and economic policies

It’s vital that all 103 members of the Progressive Caucus work together. Elected officials run for office as individuals — but we can only govern as a team.
_**Got it! How can I help Greg and the Congressional Progressive Caucus?**_
We need your help to continue organizing **both** inside the halls of power and also out in the community — from Texas to DC. This work takes a great amount of resources. [**Will you chip in what you can today and help Team Casar continue to organize and deliver for working families in this leadership role?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55715043/382574767/1421533648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRlMjk0OS0xZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-omTBLSU5piWElngW85fseZbTQyWBGTq_x4AYI4XA0=)

****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55715045/382574768/-1765736522?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRlMjk0OS0xZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-omTBLSU5piWElngW85fseZbTQyWBGTq_x4AYI4XA0=)****

Let's get it done, Peter. — Team Casar

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Join TEC’s Recycling Roundup for North Nashville Residents!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm reaching out to encourage you to join the Tennessee Environmental Council (TEC) for their first Recycling Roundup! This is a drive through event taking place at Tennessee State University’s campus on Saturday, December 10th from 9AM-3PM.
TSU is hosting the first of 10 events taking place across our state to decrease illegal dumping and littering and to reduce our reliance on landfills. We’re facing serious waste-management issues in our state and the Tennessee Environmental Council is committed to making these events easy and accessible for participants. Recycling Roundup is free to residents and is a simple way to do our part to improve our neighborhoods.
The event will take place at the indoor practice field parking lot of TSU’s campus, see details below. To see a list of accepted items, and learn more about Recycling Roundup events, click here [https://www.tectn.org/recyclingroundup.html] .
Please participate if you can!
Best,
Heidi Campbell
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/RR%20TSU%20Flyer%20IG%20JPG%20%281%29.jpg]
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

subject: The latest on the Dirty Deal, our opposition and updated calls to action.
body:

_Thank you for being a part of the ongoing fight against the Dirty Deal._ Our grassroots pressure is working. The Dirty Deal was pulled out of the must-pass NDAA (Defense Bill) in the House on Tuesday, and we barely had a breath to celebrate before news hit that Manchin is now trying to find another vehicle for the dirty deal; either through an [amendment to the NDAA ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbdhClyk64KGvTPK408pDF7lEOEnfa8kZnDZOXXonPOG5NEmQTJp2TwXLejC5cxGO33sc0hwRqnqFdqCgfS0gypzCGQ7SExzQNWlUpNG9SD1Q9jqcScedLvHHS2UDMw64pmSMXSYSW33lvy5JyPM_G9NKNiTH8sKVq_6fspE0xY4aw4ybsDEqx9128RUTFNBaOL2KvvOsuwkNm2MHpMqNUN06ix2Jsf5-stXRs3PVgu1r9wfha2aD7fTtmNSsXSnhfaMCHXAom4N1ZO7ptbwUXWBead1fxCT5OtqN5BCYkmqPGR0BYxV6w6Bro26fRJg5YD3Ndx8AygOaQbHu-4sgojO3urWTgHr_H8kdQNFdyQ9cOr1Ew677LDl6skvMPJv_T_C4zSLxSJ3Q1_tEWoXb6ZAR4Any-w27pzywex3_YdTJ80UejIcE9CpA_Lgktpfvzjram9p07Dk1phnJkyK9g6tXgUvBjEvfZpLSTDoikFiE_9zqKpyuwf39kXLG21tSJ8NLQuSF8JTWBdViKIz-Xi_lG3_xBn_g2MnZEYLDW0CZ8HrgGwvowCVAjpWKV68f87tV0DwoHaAAQtODgUeSp2gAd3z1SwM0B5vqTBjlR8pMmLlUUKBV1t3a1qBheJZucwYrmxwHTiHTeZH2WqseLowYWRdCpyacFqk3U1fDDBn7FIR-VD4EDc1W9qYREK6al8ZbiHqlWehVoBKV765ybJY/3rt/qqo349AnQVCOvVPkTkFRUA/h1/I6NfXEveB8taOmhavk35THR4QzfQWcPfC6uSnDgJjV4)when it comes to the Senate, or by attaching it to the end of the year spending bill. **** As long as Manchin keeps pushing this Dirty Deal, we’ll keep fighting it. **Did you know that every day this week, frontline EJ leaders have been meeting with target lawmakers urging them to oppose the Dirty Deal?** Over 750 climate, environmental justice, and progressive advocacy groups sent a letter to congressional leaders urging them to abandon Manchin’s Dirty Deal. **Concerned folks at home have been driving calls to their representatives and key officials.****Others have hosted actions, name: Deluzio HQ
subject: It’s been one month since our people-powered team made history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
But the election was just the beginning of everything we will accomplish together.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726211/382585670/1887529763?refcode=em_fr_2022.12.08_b1_dhq_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzE4MjM2YS0yNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Il5tM03gVVDq44zgZ7zl2K0E8Bhi4_xeUKJUe4-nd9Y=) Hi Derek,

One month ago today, we stood together and elected Chris to represent Pennsylvania’s 17th District, defeating the dark-money outside groups that were targeting us.

**Our people powered team rose to the occasion and proved that when working folks come together,_we are unstoppable._**

But the election was just the beginning of everything our people-powered team will accomplish together. Chris will be sworn in to Congress in just a few short weeks, and we need to continue to support him as he advocates for our district in Washington.

[**At the end of the month, our team faces a major public fundraising deadline – and it’s critical that we put forward the strongest showing possible. name: Becca Balint
subject: What this moment means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
The Respect for Marriage Act has passed! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726403/382586416/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJlMWY2Ni0yNzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIv_Y6lMNEhLHtVXP3Vdt8qylszArCka1NtlkMce3Cs=&emci=236e0a70-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=82be1f66-2777-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43402272) | Peter: The Respect for Marriage Act has OFFICIALLY passed, which means it’s off to President Biden’s desk for a signature! Interracial and LGBTQ couples deserve the same security, benefits, and recognition that legal marriage provides to every other American couple. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726404/382586417/966991095?emci=236e0a70-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJlMWY2Ni0yNzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIv_Y6lMNEhLHtVXP3Vdt8qylszArCka1NtlkMce3Cs=) When my wife Elizabeth and I were first married, we had to have the Justice of the Peace perform a Civil Union because Civil Marriage for same-sex couples was not yet legal in Vermont. It didn’t dampen our joy on that day, but it did feel like we were being asked to be content with being second-class citizens. By passing the Respect for Marriage Act today, no loving couple will ever have to settle for less because of who they love or how they identify. And now, even if the Supreme Court were to overturn the right to marriage guaranteed by the _Obergefell_ decision, your right to marry who you love will remain intact. As we work to make progress into the future, treating others with kindness, dignity, and respect will always lead us in the right direction. Today, it certainly has. With love, Becca Balint
---

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726408/382586421/-702467740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJlMWY2Ni0yNzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIv_Y6lMNEhLHtVXP3Vdt8qylszArCka1NtlkMce3Cs=&emci=236e0a70-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=82be1f66-2777-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43402272)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726409/382586422/-1431749372?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJlMWY2Ni0yNzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIv_Y6lMNEhLHtVXP3Vdt8qylszArCka1NtlkMce3Cs=) If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=LDa5dodoYa63yb04JI6kjJwdObdoUTFMSp1O8QIaUS%2BY0D2bElFy5y83UwBLZyqtWsjinC%2FQY7hFgoa%2FlQy8cEUPmBDcfvJ7R5txYOvt%2B3VMqI7Oh5NVTEQQZVmn9RlJbwnIy7ax6r3tHpGNYbRKvmmTHaNHfD3bRP5aG7ovygB7X%2Bw7bnf5rmClmYYAjO9oPWdFMuGrF%2FKz3CUH4Imm6xluf4JF6TD9N7k6rYIdAnO3C%2FGUTLU9owtmo3wXo3H%2BARscw13zWzmWujRlPc0zPloFs1jvdrJOIcClQ0F8fUkvPL8vVFElx61MRTRy3JpEFSkkHilwz1L79%2F7VqqgyeWUW6r5aZMmm%2Fx1mXCkqPU%2FmngZvDE3T2vstpeK4f6qmbwtIwh%2BDme3Nbm0mNspGtYTnfxbtsFfbZ21hh5C5rn54dCu27n%2B4CRvilkiHWWTT). name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmk68gp400bgk6gshp8j65qtj3rgbpiv4m496ogg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clh62oj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zja6ri58t0thrvg3jn15hctkmrohr300cq5enbm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clh62oj6c9h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zho5tue09o2irhv75jskgq4bg90ei2odf0me8ipo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clh62oj6c9h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Andrew=20Garbarino?=
subject: I’m ashamed of NYC’s radical District Attorney
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
As a New Yorker myself, I’m ashamed to see what’s happening in NYC | | | | | | | Friend, **Did you see what New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg did? He downgraded 52% of the city’s felonies to misdemeanors, letting more violent criminals off easy.**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c518c7eb4b&e=fdefed58de)
---
As a New Yorker myself, I’m ashamed to see what’s happening in NYC, and as long as progressives refuse to prosecute criminals in the city, things will only get worse. This is a horrible idea. Just look at the skyrocketing crime rates in New York, Philadelphia, Chicago, and DC. In just New York City, rape is up 10.9 percent, robberies are up 32.4 percent, burglary is up 29.1 percent, and grand larceny is up 38.5 percent from 2021. ([source](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f75544225d&e=fdefed58de)) **_When progressive DAs let criminals go free, our streets are less safe, period._** **That’s why I’m fighting every day in Washington to stop progressive ideologies that aim to defund law enforcement, eliminate cash bail, and make our cities less safe.**
**If you’re like me and you believe in backing the blue, prosecuting violent criminals, and standing up for law and order,**[**support my fight for safer streets with a donation today! >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2808b4fe63&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**SUPPORT SAFER STREES >> CHIP IN**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d119312013&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE >> $75**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a21be77014&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE >> $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f899828088&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE >> $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cfdd3d3ffa&e=fdefed58de)
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f85dc45394&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Friend, I’m Andrew Garbarino, Republican Congressman from New York’s 2nd district. **When I was a member of New York’s State Assembly,**_**I voted NO on no-cash bail**_**, and I warned my colleagues about the deadly consequences of this radical policy.** Now, I’m doing everything I can to stop it nationwide in Washington, D.C. and make our communities safer for everyone. I believe that district attorneys like Alvin Bragg in NYC are single-handedly putting the lives of our kids, families, and small business owners at risk.
* _They eliminate cash bail._
* _They refuse to prosecute career criminals._
* _They give violent offenders soft sentences._
* _They let mobs of criminals loot small businesses._

Coming from a family of small business owners, I understand just how destructive these soft-on-crime policies are first-hand. **If we want to save our communities, we have to change course FAST... and I’m counting on you to join my fight and make our streets safer for everyone.** [**Join my fight for safer streets in Washington with a donation of ANY AMOUNT today! >>>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=513a650c2a&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE TODAY >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7ba02a96c6&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Thank you,
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f174623356&e=fdefed58de)
---
Andrew Garbarino Congressman, NY-02
---

body:

Peter,

BREAKING NEWS.

Did you see this, Peter? The race for the 2024 Republican Nomination for President has officially begun with President Trump declaring his candidacy, and we want to know what you think.

**[WHO WOULD YOU VOTE FOR IN 2024 FOR THE REPUBLICAN NOMINEE FOR PRESIDENT?>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046084:6Af6noGNr:m:1:3253819041:E8ED87432D7FD762D7FEE53BCFAD990C:r)**

With inflation at historic levels, a border in crisis, and crime skyrocketing, the nation is struggling. _Who do you think should go head-to-head with Biden in 2024 to save the nation?_

**[WHO SHOULD BE THE 2024 REPUBLICAN NOMINEE FOR PRESIDENT?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046084:6Af6noGNr:m:1:3253819041:E8ED87432D7FD762D7FEE53BCFAD990C:r)**

Since Joe Biden took office, the border has become less secure, communities have become less safe, and the economy has been crushed. America is struggling under his FAILED socialist agenda.

**[Please take our poll and contribute RIGHT NOW to make your voice heard.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046084:6Af6noGNr:m:1:3253819041:E8ED87432D7FD762D7FEE53BCFAD990C:r)**

Thank you,

GOP Headquarters

**[RESPOND NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046084:6Af6noGNr:m:1:3253819041:E8ED87432D7FD762D7FEE53BCFAD990C:r)**

name: Rick Larsen
subject: I am proud to cast this vote:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55728864/382599512/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQ1YWVlYy0zMzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pp4o8ksDJjRIFCJlbV-Sy0jowVUhTC39l_XYrH9XGtE=&emci=b844a003-2577-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=f845aeec-3377-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Today, the House passed the Respect for Marriage Act, a powerful step forward in protecting same-sex and interracial marriage.** I was proud to cast a vote for equality. Marriage is a fundamental right, and it is my responsibility as a Congressman to ensure that all people's rights are protected regardless of race, class, or creed. Critically, the Respect for Marriage Act does three things to advance the cause of marriage equality:
1. Repeal the Defense of Marriage Act.
2. Require the federal government to recognize legal, state-level marriages.
3. Guarantee that a marriage in any state is recognized in every other state.

**Combined, these three actions create a legal system that guarantees the right to marriage for same-sex and interracial couples and ensures that those marriages are recognized throughout the nation.** I am proud to stand with the many grassroots organizations and countless American families who relentlessly advocated for the Respect for Marriage Act. I am also thrilled that this law was passed on a bipartisan basis in both the House and Senate. While we celebrate the passage of this historic legislation, we must keep up the fight to ensure equality for all. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll clean_body: | | | | Today, the House passed the Respect for Marriage Act, a powerful step forward in protecting same-sex and interracial marriage. I was proud to cast a vote for equality. Marriage is a fundamental right, and it is my responsibility as a Congressman to ensure that all people's rights are protected regardless of race, class, or creed. Critically, the Respect for Marriage Act does three things to advance the cause of marriage equality: 1. Repeal the Defense of Marriage Act. 2. Require the federal government to recognize legal, state-level marriages. 3. Guarantee that a marriage in any state is recognized in every other state. Combined, these three actions create a legal system that guarantees the right to marriage for same-sex and interracial couples and ensures that those marriages are recognized throughout the nation. I am proud to stand with the many grassroots organizations and countless American families who relentlessly advocated for the Respect for Marriage Act. I am also thrilled that this law was passed on a bipartisan basis in both the House and Senate. While we celebrate the passage of this historic legislation, we must keep up the fight to ensure equality for all. Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UU2P2yAU_DX2zRZ-YJM9-LCbKO2lUrfdjfaGCDxitP4Sxony7_tw070VARIz8waYh23VSFZXnEue21aArpzJfQsMoAK2q-oKxK60wJllQjq3EwaZzQTDQfu-dAExdn78xGDpfC_NNORdy6wxomkAUDpT1417co43NbIGzk8cZd63XYzzkvHnDI40b7db2aEOfrwU2ttC26s3mNyItLTOuET1UChSLEo7x0Sq5kdtYsYPz_s3loaQEgQdMmjWOKhlWoNB4uOgH9CA1q8DQeThe68jPgijh1n7y0jUuigcle5Vp7X60ikySUjhpnW0GJbCTuu5J5wz9Z8HzCTwS4dBeUvGR4rs7W9khxTZv6unMeKY_vELr787HTDlT6Qa-63u43TY4-n78io3sKMMCP0pcf2w8JqH1s4339NNjaT2XLb2pG7Ql3rv7m0mXzKArQxgCx7WyE_6_f1HuBfh-ll8q09wSSTsaY_3Gb-UD5Ny63pC5eEPTQ-2RA)
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UU1v4yAQ_TX2zRYebJOLD22j9FSpu9tWe0MTGGJUfwnjZPPvd0izvS0CJN5784A31FWtEk0lpZK57WrAypncdyAAKhC7qqmg3pUWpLCiVs7takPCZrWgEf1QukAUez99UrB8vpZmHvO-c7LayVbhUaBtLbaNM6iEOArplCGEfOj6GJc1kw8ZHHheLpeyJwx-OhXobYH27A0lNyYtryOtUd8VmhWrRudEnarlAU3M5P7h6U2kUSsFNR8yaLc46nXegiHm44h3aCTrt5Eh9vCDx0h3wuC4oD9NTG2rpknjoHtE_a3TbJKQws3bZCmshZ2348C4FPo_D1hY4NeegvaWjQ8c2dtXZPsU2b-r5ynSlP7xk86_egyU8mdST8NXHcVNvv5p9uYG9pwBo6-Ktt8WfuShs8vFD3xTq7g9p1t7Ujf4S4N31y5TjxnArQzgFjxsUX7g-_tLuBbh_Fk8Nx9wSiQ88R6vC30r7yblresJVfu_Kgq25w)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UU1v6yAQ_DX2zRZesEkOPrSNXKlSpb5-6d0QgXWM6i9hnCj__i1u2ttDgMTM7ACzWBeVZGXBueSprQXoojWpq4EBFMB2RVmA2OUWOLNMyLbdCYPMJoLhoF2ftx4xdG78Qm_pfM3NNKRdDbwSpuB7FNxwXclyVxRiL6p9xQ1WR5v2dRfCvCT8LoGG5uVyyTvU3o2nTDubaXt2BqMbkZbWEZegbgpFikXptmUiVvNGm5Dww93DO4tDSAmCDglUaxjUMq3eIPFh0DdoQOvWgSDycL3TAW-E0cOs3Wkkal0Ujkr3qtNa_eoUmUQka6d1tOiXzE7rsSecM_WfB8wkcEuHXjlLxg1F9v4d2SFG9nP1NAYc4z9e8fzWaY8xfyLV2G91i2nKp8Nb87psYEcZEPoicf1r4U_qaztfXE83VZLac9raE7tBX-pde60TeZ8AbGUAW_CwBv6pPz6e_TXz56_ssfyEUyThgfZwnfFXeTPJt65HVB7-AdxFtYY)
