name: The Giffords Team
subject: We can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Nobody can wait for a future where we no longer have to worry about the potential of gunfire raining down in what should be safe spaces in our communities.
#

Friends -
The children in our schools can’t wait.
The person with an abusive partner can’t wait.
The communities disproportionately impacted by gun violence—our Hispanic and Latino communities, our Black communities, our AAPI communities, our LGBTQ+ communities—they all can’t wait.
Nobody can wait for a future where we no longer have to worry about the potential of gunfire raining down in what should be safe spaces like school, church, work, or the grocery store.
We must demand action now from our elected leaders to take action on their promises, and we will continue fighting every day at Giffords PAC to make sure a future free from gun violence becomes a reality.
So what do you say?
[**Will you make your first online contribution of any amount to Giffords PAC today to help us in the fight to end America’s gun violence epidemic?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221208-1-15&t=1&akid=2829%2E3935704%2ED5ZVSJ)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221208-1-15&t=3&akid=2829%2E3935704%2ED5ZVSJ)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2829%2E3935704%2ED5ZVSJ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

**This has gone far enough.**

My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA).

We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to hold radical Left teachers and school board members accountable.

But I can't do it without your support.

clean_body: Peter, Several democrats want to criminalize parents. They used COVID as a power grab to shut down your schools and strapped masks on your children. And in the classroom, the radical Left: Indoctrinates children with Critical Race Theory. Grooms them with transgender ideology. Forces explicit sexual education on kids as young as kindergarten. And if you object, they label you as " terrorists" and send the FBI after you. This has gone far enough. My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to hold radical Left teachers and school board members accountable. Peter, PUOA is flipping school boards across the country. But I can't do it without your support. I've set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end of the week to help us target corrupt school board members and replace them with America-First candidates. If you're fed up with the corruption and influence of the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union, and the politicians they support, then I invite you to partner with PUOA. Parents Union of America is the anti-union. We are a vehicle for conservative parents and teachers across the US to systematically restore God as the foundation of our culture, beginning with our education system. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Women who’ve lost abortion access in their states are still in danger, and we can help
body:
Abortion is inaccessible in some states now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19d16c1e-7dcc-4be5-bb5f-2f9d2965034e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_The election is over and went incredibly for us, but women are still in danger like never before._** _The right of women to choose when they wish to, and wish not to have children has become nonexistent in whole swaths of this country. The Dobbs decision created chaos,__ with some swing and/or more conservative or states luckily having protections for reproductive rights already written into their constitution. Therefore, the onus was placed on voters to vote for ballot measures to overturn their constitutions on this issue, and luckily these efforts failed in states even as Republican as Kentucky and Kansas._ _Other states have moderate to liberal enough electorates that if they couldn't get it through their state legislatures, they put it on the ballot and successfully added it to their constitutions, like Michigan._ [_**Can you please rush $5, $10, $25 or more to the National Network of Abortion Funds and Blue Amp Action to protect abortion access this season?**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58aeab60-a754-4459-953b-bc129c9e95ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _But there are other states where gerrymandered legislatures have passed cruel and unjust laws, and so far there has been no relief granted via amendment to the constitution placed on ballot measures._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Support abortion access with NNAF & Blue Amp**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T473bf093-ac95-4cd9-95ab-ac19b40c05f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _This includes the state where I live, Ohio, which became infamous for it's ridiculous six week ban that forced a 10-year old who was raped to leave the state to get an abortion--Ohio's Republican legislators chose to emotionally assault her after she'd already suffered a physical assault. _ _I bring this up as it shows how much of a random role geography and history play into a life changing issue, as a woman who happened to be born or settle to the south of me, in Kentucky, has her reproductive rights, as does a woman to the north of me, in Michigan. But a woman nearby in Ohio, is completely out of luck unless she can afford what might be an expensive trip out of state._ **_This is where the National Network of Abortion Funds steps in. They ensure that women, no matter their geography, gerrymandered state legislature or any other factors have access to their most basic rights--that they retain control of their bodies instead of handing it over to the state. The Network helps with financial costs of the procedure, childcare, travel, translation and a place to stay, if necessary._** **_They are truly, in this dark time for women's rights, doing the work of the angels, and continuing in the long tradition of the underground railroad and suffragettes, among others, to help those whom our government(s) has abandoned. _** [_**Can you please rush $5, $10, $25 or more to the National Network of Abortion Funds and Blue Amp Action to protect abortion access this season?**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e03ae56-4bc9-462a-888b-83bf9150d708/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Without getting too cheeky, it is cold in many parts of the country from October-March, and pregnancies tend to increase. So if you could help out now, it would be a huge boost to women just trying to get by and not have their rights stripped from them by oppressive governments. Thank you for your compassion,
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f8c7b1d-d4a3-4dee-a949-9be9b4eccdd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fb927ba-8fb4-4f69-9c7c-95148308fde4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The Respect for Marriage Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I could not have been more proud - and honored - to have voted to pass the Respect for Marriage Act through the House
Peter,

After the ultra-conservative Supreme Court set a dangerous precedent by overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , it became clear that other fundamental rights and freedoms would soon be under attack, too.

**That 's why I could not have been more proud - and honored - to help forward the Respect for Marriage Act through the House. This legislation ensures all married couples, including same-sex and interracial couples, are entitled to the rights of marriage, no matter which state they live in.**

Enshrining marriage equality into federal law is about solidifying basic rights, allowing millions of Americans to live freely as themselves. It's about defending the right to love openly, proudly, and _equally._

**I will continue fighting to protect the equality and justice to which all of us are entitled and am proud to see this crucial legislation headed to the President 's desk to be signed into law. [Will you join me in calling on President Biden to make the Respect for Marriage Act law ASAP by signing our petition today? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fknd-JLIkpeacxSY5iZ4pbydJQARDkp7wap1VVJ05rc=/PHgAoAU-vwx5OaoRKM1UO2c_6KLDV_jT6Bc4j40jLow=?ms=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fknd-JLIkpeacxSY5iZ4pbydJQARDkp7wap1VVJ05rc=/PHgAoAU-vwx5OaoRKM1UO2c_6KLDV_jT6Bc4j40jLow=?ms=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
This is a step forward, but there's still important work ahead.

The fight for equality will endure so long as there are lawmakers who continue to try and take our country backward. I'll keep working to build a democracy that respects the rights and liberties of _all_ Americans.

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fknd-JLIkpeacxSY5iZ4pbydJQARDkp7wap1VVJ05rc=/8eWPBJt37Egon1bEzrRC8cnH11d2X928BwB7DPWrRnE=?refcode=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221208_respec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A glimpse behind the fundraising curtain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12082022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12082022]
Team,
As we gear up for the next year, I wanted to share some impressive data from my campaign finance team.
You may have read by now that we raised more than $10 million during the 2022 cycle. Yes, that’s an exciting number, but what I love sharing even more is that nearly 90% (89.7% to be exact!) of that came from contributions of $100 and under.
So thank you, once again, for your continued support.
You all know I’m a planner, so don’t be surprised when you hear from my team in the coming weeks about why early money is so important in an election cycle.
Until then, I hope you all have a wonderful December and enjoy the last month of 2022!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12082022]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. name: Dick Durbin
subject: It’s an honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I’m ready to get to work.
#
Peter,
Today, my Democratic colleagues re-elected me as Senate Majority Whip, and I plan to continue to serve as Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee.
Serving the people of Illinois every day is an honor. I’m grateful to be in the position to help families in my state and all across the country and keep serving in these leadership roles.
Now, the work continues. And one of the biggest tasks ahead is confirming new federal judges.
But our Democratic majority in the Senate is still extremely slim. We can’t let our guard down.
I’m asking this team to stay in the fight and help me defend Democrats’ progress in Washington.
**[We have only a couple more goals ahead of us this year — including tonight’s. Can you pitch in $5 now towards our end-of-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55729587/382603103/-1581068768?refcode=dd_em_221208_t1_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjVjZWRkZi0zYTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K063E7gGz-lR4UQCqt-_MxuuRmkFiCnASU_3a02lPPw=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Dan Kildee for Congress
subject: early organizing efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi there,

Thanks to you, Dan won last month’s election and will continue serving mid-Michiganders in Congress. Over $20 million was spent on Dan’s district, making it one of the most expensive races across the country. Much of that was by outside dark money super PACs and our self-funding opponent.

Despite running in a newly drawn, competitive district, Dan had a decisive victory. But this didn’t happen by accident—it happened because of grassroots supporters like YOU.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork for the next election. **Because of redistricting, Dan’s district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing, even in the off-year (when Dan isn't on the ballot).**

**[If you’re able, chip in here to support our early Team Kildee organizing efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55729978/382605034/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=hPXoqIofZ%2BIFqB3al3mCBwBzuSolrJ5Y4Dad91XVfscTJ1YFDe1zVl8H00vMQ72V49%2F9ZFmHVx0EnVPWgcoefUZGczA1gPA1oN8VyZaTsIkxsGfzlN8SRczUNVq59dCWF2SNxmojziGuppboLmUaOA%3D%3D&refcode2=864deaf8-3b77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221208_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjRkZWFmOC0zYjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqbuciDg_BE9bTl-D0gY3ROqPeHjmVlDoWoJ6BjXyFc=)**

What do our early efforts look like? From strengthening local Democratic parties, to partnering with local organizations, to hiring organizers in the community, our campaign is already planning for the new year. But those early organizing efforts take resources to stand up and sustain.

**[Can you chip in $15 or any amount to be a supporter of our Team Kildee early organizing efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55729979/382605035/1325829060?amount=17.08&contactdata=hPXoqIofZ%2BIFqB3al3mCBwBzuSolrJ5Y4Dad91XVfscTJ1YFDe1zVl8H00vMQ72V49%2F9ZFmHVx0EnVPWgcoefUZGczA1gPA1oN8VyZaTsIkxsGfzlN8SRczUNVq59dCWF2SNxmojziGuppboLmUaOA%3D%3D&refcode2=864deaf8-3b77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221208_FR_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjRkZWFmOC0zYjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqbuciDg_BE9bTl-D0gY3ROqPeHjmVlDoWoJ6BjXyFc=)**

clean_body: | Hi there, Thanks to you, Dan won last month’s election and will continue serving mid-Michiganders in Congress. Over $20 million was spent on Dan’s district, making it one of the most expensive races across the country. Much of that was by outside dark money super PACs and our self-funding opponent. Despite running in a newly drawn, competitive district, Dan had a decisive victory. But this didn’t happen by accident—it happened because of grassroots supporters like YOU. On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork for the next election. Because of redistricting, Dan’s district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing, even in the off-year (when Dan isn't on the ballot). = What do our early efforts look like? From strengthening local Democratic parties, to partnering with local organizations, to hiring organizers in the community, our campaign is already planning for the new year. But those early organizing efforts take resources to stand up and sustain. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Let's check in on Abigail Spanberger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
She hasn't stopped moving since her win. | | | Hi Peter – URD-endorsed candidate Rep. Abigail Spanberger won one of the most hotly contested races in the House last month, and she hasn't stopped moving since her incredible win. **We were extremely proud to have helped her beat her GOP opponent and keep a critical battleground district blue.** Now, we're proud to share that Rep. Spanberger has been recognized by her colleagues as having a unique style of "commonsense representation," and is being endorsed by many to take on a battleground leadership position in Congress. Abigail has spent her entire career dedicated to public service, first as a federal case worker, then as a Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) case officer, and now as a U.S. Congresswoman. Since her recent reelection, Abigail has continued her fight to support her constituents, many of whom live in rural areas.
* Rep. Spanberger recently introduced the Internet Freedom and Operations (INFO) Act, which would increase efforts to **protect Internet freedom** and circumvent censorship online.
* She hosted a town hall to listen to her constituents and speak about the importance of **reducing inflation, preventing gun violence, improving veterans' benefits, and protecting reproductive rights.**
* She urged her colleagues in Congress to pass the Respect for Marriage Act and **protect the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals.**

We can't wait to see what Rep. Spanberger continues to do in support of rural communities and all Americans. Your support made it possible for Rep. Spanberger to win one of the most difficult races in the country. **[We couldn't have done it without you, Peter. Chip in here to split a contribution with URD and Rep. clean_body: She hasn't stopped moving since her win. | | | Hi Peter – URD-endorsed candidate Rep. Abigail Spanberger won one of the most hotly contested races in the House last month, and she hasn't stopped moving since her incredible win. We were extremely proud to have helped her beat her GOP opponent and keep a critical battleground district blue. Now, we're proud to share that Rep. Spanberger has been recognized by her colleagues as having a unique style of "commonsense representation," and is being endorsed by many to take on a battleground leadership position in Congress. Abigail has spent her entire career dedicated to public service, first as a federal case worker, then as a Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) case officer, and now as a U.S. Congresswoman. Since her recent reelection, Abigail has continued her fight to support her constituents, many of whom live in rural areas. Rep. Spanberger recently introduced the Internet Freedom and Operations (INFO) Act, which would increase efforts to protect Internet freedom and circumvent censorship online. She hosted a town hall to listen to her constituents and speak about the importance of reducing inflation, preventing gun violence, improving veterans' benefits, and protecting reproductive rights. She urged her colleagues in Congress to pass the Respect for Marriage Act and protect the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals. We can't wait to see what Rep. Spanberger continues to do in support of rural communities and all Americans. Your support made it possible for Rep. Spanberger to win one of the most difficult races in the country. Thank you for all of your support. – United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: We could lose our country for good!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:

---

**It 's now more important than ever we Champion American Values** because Joe Biden and the Democrats won't stop destroying America until their radical agenda is completely fulfilled.

They want to:

\- End the filibuster
\- Pack the courts
\- Raise taxes
\- Increase out-of-control-spending

To put it briefly...they want to turn the American dream _into a socialist nightmare!_

That's why I need _**[YOUR continued support](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046276:6TBKZoGNd:m:1:3365131770:B2CEE2B579BC6FCB409EDFD0ED3D12CE:r "YOUR continued
support")**_ to enable me and our Conservative Cavalry to once again put America FIRST.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046276:6TBKZoGNd:m:1:3365131770:B2CEE2B579BC6FCB409EDFD0ED3D12CE:r)
---

President Reagan was right: faith, family, and freedom are the pillars of American democracy, but the left continues to attack our values on each of these fronts.

If we don't stop their radical agenda we may lose our country for good.

---
| | [PUT AMERICA FIRST](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046276:6TBKZoGNd:m:1:3365131770:B2CEE2B579BC6FCB409EDFD0ED3D12CE:r)
---

That's why as we head into 2023 and 2024, I'm going to need you to stay by my side \- __**[are you with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046276:6TBKZoGNd:m:1:3365131770:B2CEE2B579BC6FCB409EDFD0ED3D12CE:r "are you with
me?")**__

Your help and support is key, and there is a lot of work to do to champion American values!

Never Give An Inch,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62046276:6TBKZoGNd:m:1:3365131770:B2CEE2B579BC6FCB409EDFD0ED3D12CE:r)

Mike Pompeo

subject: defending our most basic rights

body:
I was proud to vote for the Respect for Marriage Act to protect the universal right to marriage equality.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55730411/382607289/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdjZTE5OC0zZjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPNMRojOOvE2MHzq9jk9rA9-hldZ89YEQ_1uP072uJI=)
---
| Peter –

Earlier today, the House of Representatives passed landmark legislation to protect marriage equality under federal law. **I was proud to vote for the Respect for Marriage Act to protect the universal right to marriage equality.**

It’s simple: a right is not a right unless it can be equally exercised by all, and every American deserves the freedom to love who they love, free from discrimination.

The conservative-majority Supreme Court’s decision earlier this year to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ was proof that they will not hesitate to rescind long-held constitutional freedoms. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that families who depend on the rights and privileges guaranteed by marriage equality will no longer need to wonder if one day they will wake up in a nation that no longer recognizes their marriage.

**Now the bill will go to President Biden to be signed into law.[_Will you add your name to my petition to show your support for federally protected marriage equality?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55730412/382607290/-282894459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdjZTE5OC0zZjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GPNMRojOOvE2MHzq9jk9rA9-hldZ89YEQ_1uP072uJI=&emci=61726a74-2e77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=0d7ce198-3f77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5543981)**

clean_body: I was proud to vote for the Respect for Marriage Act to protect the universal right to marriage equality. | = | Peter – Earlier today, the House of Representatives passed landmark legislation to protect marriage equality under federal law. I was proud to vote for the Respect for Marriage Act to protect the universal right to marriage equality. It’s simple: a right is not a right unless it can be equally exercised by all, and every American deserves the freedom to love who they love, free from discrimination. The conservative-majority Supreme Court’s decision earlier this year to overturn Roe v. Wade was proof that they will not hesitate to rescind long-held constitutional freedoms. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that families who depend on the rights and privileges guaranteed by marriage equality will no longer need to wonder if one day they will wake up in a nation that no longer recognizes their marriage. Now the bill will go to President Biden to be signed into law. | When our rights are under attack, I fight back, and I’m glad to have you by my side. Onward, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us **
body:
Find out what the doctor said

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0daa520fd1a45b3b6b7962a45ac2206&_e=vqdFoZMr1ExfKrExVyHR83MrLoortxuIIeDRX0p-v7szjPKoVx8wgsW71GoOhAv7IwzHhfH1DFbrUiP3oCTIXcU5wOtD50IYJ7AtBK9r3as3kL1fBmmYBF39jJAe7TxXExUfuDVCAOHr5KZGoOVVnJmA_emX2lm4DTxqnMfgJTUaH5u5z7PTbUS5PbFca7M0kFUzTDHU91Nrli0kgO1pO7SLsp_2hu43kCswLtIVBadTq3cKhaDfreqXs92lB9jZexkULQvHULLtlrwN2mbg5LaIjbpbo4QEv4glgyKiw0PLMQpFDTl-y84f0Q7ntaF4SBzs5AykclAW9slRJUow8jgZpNPurG0jlpQobGPz0ouEqdfjj3xw5Q5ScFOSLvJnyM3mIjfJaI6N73VXP9HtOT5QkfWKd4j5AoONoJ_jB5JtjsZ8AFllQKiJLgvRH13D-BcnpMpY-3qNUvvkjTilU1_1oNHia0jsw5TZfau54M5wkdybJ2d4qvmYdSxhUSURoE6-rhXxmYcyD7hqE1KsIg%3D%3D)
---
Folks,

I woke up the other morning with a funny feeling.

Something that I could feel in my bones and my ankles, from my toes, running up to my brain.

I decided to go to the doctor to find out what was the matter, and he said that I have **_Patriolitis,_** meaning **[I have chronic Patriotism for our country.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0daa520fd1a45b3b6b7962a45ac2206&_e=vqdFoZMr1ExfKrExVyHR83MrLoortxuIIeDRX0p-v7szjPKoVx8wgsW71GoOhAv7IwzHhfH1DFbrUiP3oCTIXcU5wOtD50IYJ7AtBK9r3as3kL1fBmmYBF39jJAe7TxXExUfuDVCAOHr5KZGoOVVnJmA_emX2lm4DTxqnMfgJTUaH5u5z7PTbUS5PbFca7M0kFUzTDHU91Nrli0kgO1pO7SLsp_2hu43kCswLtIVBadTq3cKhaDfreqXs92lB9jZexkULQvHULLtlrwN2mbg5LaIjbpbo4QEv4glgyKiw0PLMQpFDTl-y84f0Q7ntaF4SBzs5AykclAW9slRJUow8jgZpNPurG0jlpQobGPz0ouEqdfjj3xw5Q5ScFOSLvJngeaAJQ_jdkz66cC5wZSmDTA4eFlLOZxGODQmlD9kZ1UZlf6KaPm5TDm0Yqe3lcfcJGkesmI7mFUHNNrDcwDEEK02gD4Q8RyK93l9_ehAK4h9Ir_Sqatoew2mH2ress0VnXaeX_Q8ANocNQF4S5aIiw%3D%3D)**

I can assure you that there are plenty of Democrats currently in office who are immune from Patriolitis because they can’t stand to see our country succeed unless there’s something in it for them.

Unlike them, I’m only here because I want to serve you and our country. I’m fighting with every tooth and nail in my body to bring **Patriotism and love for God and Country back to Washington.**
**_[Can I ask for your support to get our operation back and running to defeat the radical left?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0daa520fd1a45b3b6b7962a45ac2206&_e=vqdFoZMr1ExfKrExVyHR83MrLoortxuIIeDRX0p-v7szjPKoVx8wgsW71GoOhAv7IwzHhfH1DFbrUiP3oCTIXcU5wOtD50IYJ7AtBK9r3as3kL1fBmmYBF39jJAe7TxXExUfuDVCAOHr5KZGoOVVnJmA_emX2lm4DTxqnMfgJTUaH5u5z7PTbUS5PbFca7M0kFUzTDHU91Nrli0kgO1pO7SLsp_2hu43kCswLtIVBadTq3cKhaDfreqXs92lB9jZexkULQvHULLtlrwN2mbg5LaIjbpbo4QEv4glgyKiw0PLMQpFDTl-y84f0Q7ntaF4SBzs5AykclAW9slRJUow8jgZpNPurG0jlpQobGPz0ouEqdfjj3xw5Q5ScFOSLvJn-8UDOeak_hoYlEnK4oLmU0pqGDiNrQ0EaX-H7ZQhH2j4ICFge74cMdLpaOJdiCVZxM5_pl7EEh4xlHlMHbX3sakJU-tgf899QvINFrVSSo_JkqYsVy4OBViX1gY-kHmiLDWnaqPH8AhyRjOAQ0k0ow%3D%3D)_** | [**CONTRIBUTE $35**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0daa520fd1a45b3b6b7962a45ac2206&_e=vqdFoZMr1ExfKrExVyHR83MrLoortxuIIeDRX0p-v7szjPKoVx8wgsW71GoOhAv7IwzHhfH1DFbrUiP3oCTIXcU5wOtD50IYJ7AtBK9r3as3kL1fBmmYBF39jJAe7TxXExUfuDVCAOHr5KZGoOVVnJmA_emX2lm4DTxqnMfgJTUaH5u5z7PTbUS5PbFca7M0kFUzTDHU91Nrli0kgO1pO7SLsp_2hu43kCswLtIVBadTq3cKhaDfreqXs92lB9jZexkULQvHULLtlrwN2mbg5LaIjbpbo4QEv4glgyKiw0PLMQpFDTl-y84f0Q7ntaF4SBzs5AykclAW9slRJUow8jgZpNPurG0jlpQobGPz0ouEqdfjj3xw5Q5ScFOSLvJnDCia79oIHMXU7YQC3ZblKUNcfIWfNUDp1pLdEHkqMbIWnVUlNG07ZJw0Aao-7qGWwX16euD8wIqR0_gWR2M7_RLINFJojMJ4Szjkz6LW8DPN4xatP0jTpTXkLvudOEG_0Gm0dKqtZxOJKLeTXMVvVw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Find out what the doctor said | Folks, I woke up the other morning with a funny feeling. Something that I could feel in my bones and my ankles, from my toes, running up to my brain. I decided to go to the doctor to find out what was the matter, and he said that I have Patriolitis, meaning I can assure you that there are plenty of Democrats currently in office who are immune from Patriolitis because they can’t stand to see our country succeed unless there’s something in it for them. Unlike them, I’m only here because I want to serve you and our country. I’m fighting with every tooth and nail in my body to bring Patriotism and love for God and Country back to Washington. | I’ll stop hollering down a well and let you get back to gearing up for the holidays, but your support will not go unnoticed! God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. name: New Hampshire Republican State Committee
subject: Special Election Alert
body:
New Hampshire Republican State Committee

|
## Derek,
## Yesterday the House voted to vacate the tied seat in Rochester Ward 4 setting the stage for a Special Election.
## We have the opportunity to widen our majority but we need to make sure we have the resources to do so!
## Expanding our majority by just one more seat may seem insignificant, but it could really push us over the edge to pass Republican sponsored legislation, and in end support YOU!
## Can you help the NHGOP make sure we have the resources we need to make this win happen?
| [](https://nhgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbN8VpbX8uCSwVng0pXaveQ5V090UwaiOfNGL0_Uq9-PyQ&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=special_election_t1&n=1 "Donate HERE!") ## -Team NHGOP

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: demanding action from the USPS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi there,

**Last week, I was at the Palisade Ave. Teaneck Post Office ahead of the holidays to demand action & answers from the USPS.**

Gifts, mail, checks, veterans benefits, tax returns, Social Security checks, & life-saving medications have all been compromised by post office pirates and have cost Jersey Families MILLIONS of dollars. _It’s time we demand action and accountability._

[Families deserve answers, and they need to know that we are doing everything to protect their mail. It’s time the USPS takes action. Stand with me in demanding action by adding your name to our petition. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55710162/382569003/1181648004?refcode2=96c70ddf-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=JG_EM_EN_30DO_20221208_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM3MGRkZi0xOTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cxExw-pe7d60nDK1xYyVNPWpu0DXIU82VgHRl7IAIWc=&emci=92c70ddf-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=96c70ddf-1977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=37438246)

subject: The sky isn't falling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55731051/382610183/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTg4YTJjYS00Mzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRGnMoTGdXDe5A1QtX9kf26u46LzSvIWamGVVLrboO0=)

| | Folks, even though the endless news cycle may make it seem like the sky is always falling, _I promise you that it is not._ However, here’s what I can tell you is true: Republicans are about to usher in a House majority that will try to take away our rights, dismantle our social safety net, and more. **We can stop them – it’s what I’m fighting tooth and nail to do – but I can’t do it alone.** [**The sky isn’t falling but I urgently need your support to fight back against the incoming GOP House majority. Will you chip in $15 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55731053/382610185/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221208_FR_SKYFALLING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTg4YTJjYS00Mzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRGnMoTGdXDe5A1QtX9kf26u46LzSvIWamGVVLrboO0=) | | | [Chip in $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55731054/382610188/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221208_FR_SKYFALLING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTg4YTJjYS00Mzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRGnMoTGdXDe5A1QtX9kf26u46LzSvIWamGVVLrboO0=)
---
| | [Chip in more >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55731057/382610190/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221208_FR_SKYFALLING_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTg4YTJjYS00Mzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRGnMoTGdXDe5A1QtX9kf26u46LzSvIWamGVVLrboO0=)
---
Let me be clear when I say that **the incoming Republican House majority will push their far-right agenda starting on day one of being in power.**
Voting rights, LGBTQ+ freedom, and reproductive care will all be at risk when the GOP House majority takes power. Previous generations of Americans have relied on access to Social Security and Medicare, but House Republicans have indicated that their majority won’t do a thing to protect them. _In fact, they’ve already shown us the sort of brutal attacks that we should expect against them._
I want my children to live their lives with the same benefits that I had growing up, but this Republican House majority is putting that possibility in doubt for myself and so many other Nevadans.
So, even though the sky isn’t falling – _clearly!_ – it’s important that we remain clear-eyed about the present danger that is the soon-to-be Republican House majority.
[**I’m not afraid to stand up to this GOP House majority and neither should you. clean_body: | = | | Folks, even though the endless news cycle may make it seem like the sky is always falling, I promise you that it is not. However, here’s what I can tell you is true: Republicans are about to usher in a House majority that will try to take away our rights, dismantle our social safety net, and more. We can stop them – it’s what I’m fighting tooth and nail to do – but I can’t do it alone. = | | | = | | = Let me be clear when I say that the incoming Republican House majority will push their far-right agenda starting on day one of being in power. Voting rights, LGBTQ+ freedom, and reproductive care will all be at risk when the GOP House majority takes power. Previous generations of Americans have relied on access to Social Security and Medicare, but House Republicans have indicated that their majority won’t do a thing to protect them. In fact, they’ve already shown us the sort of brutal attacks that we should expect against them. I want my children to live their lives with the same benefits that I had growing up, but this Republican House majority is putting that possibility in doubt for myself and so many other Nevadans. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | |
---
I love talking directly with Democrats like you, Derek -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. **If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team.** **I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. Chip in $7 -- or whatever you can -- to the DNC today.**

So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team. I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. Chip in $7 -- or whatever you can -- to the DNC today. We’ve got to keep electing Democrats at every level who are committed to making progress, and the DNC’s work is crucial to that goal. The DNC is making historic investments in state parties, on-the-ground organizing, and protecting the right to vote. Truth be told, none of it will be possible without your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our team. Hopefully, we’ll get to talk more soon -- it’d be the highlight of my week. Joe Joseph R. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: We're Not Going Anywhere
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,
Despite the towering power of Tennessee Republicans, we refuse to give up on Tennessee. After every election cycle, candidates and campaigns fade away but our party is still right here — and we're not going anywhere.

The Tennessee Democratic Party is the only year round, active Democratic political organization in the state. We know that building Democratic power back takes consistent work and time. It also takes investment. With the Georgia runoffs finally ending, w e hope that you turn your focus back toward helping us fight the heinous bills that the Tennessee Republican Supermajority is already filing.

We need sustained, substantial investment in our year-round organizing program if we want to build back power for Democrats in Tennessee. Will you donate now to help us build back lasting, Democratic power in our state? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Republicans are going to try and push election rigging laws, deny LGBTQ+ children affirming healthcare, and expand their anti-public school voucher program in the upcoming legislative session. We already have the most restrictive anti-abortion laws in the country. Electing Democrats in Tennessee has never been more important.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty] We deeply believe in our urgent cause to make government actually work for people, and that starts with electing Democrats. We need your help to stay in this fight through 2023 and beyond — will you donate now to help us keep going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

It's going to be critical that we keep going when everyone else has slowed or pressed pause. This is not easy work and it requires tremendous resources, especially in a state like Tennessee. We truly can't do this without you.

Onward,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

name: Team AOC
subject: We’re picketing the New York Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The NYT Guild is striking today.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221208-3687-header&t=1&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)
Fans of the New York Times end up accessing several of their products a day, from Wordle to podcasts, recipes and, of course, breaking news. **But the New York Times Guild has announced a 24-hour walk out until 11:59pm TONIGHT, Thursday, December 8th, and we don’t cross picket lines — not even digital ones.**
Newsroom employees and other Guild members — such as assistants, building security guards, ad sales workers, comment moderators, and virtual producers, among others — are striking in response to the protracted bargaining process that began in March 2021 when their last union contract expired. **Management and Guild members have not come to an agreement after nearly 40 contract negotiation meetings,** and yesterday the union announced today's one-day work stoppage via Twitter.1
NYT Guild members, part of the NewsGuild of New York, are bargaining for better health and retirement benefits, clear remote-work policies, salary floors, and wage increases amidst rising inflation across the country.2 The union has also asked for improvements to the rating system used by management to assess employee performance — which workers have pointed out tends to discriminate against Black and Latinx New York Times employees.3
**A digital picket line is just as important as a physical one.** Just as Team AOC has stood with workers at Hunts Point Produce Market, union railway workers, and baristas organizing for a better workplace at Starbucks, we’ll be avoiding all New York Times products until 11:59pm tonight to stand with NewsGuild workers in their fight to secure better working conditions — **stand with us!**
**Labor solidarity is crucial to our movement.** We wish the Guild workers luck with their negotiations!
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [The Guardian](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15248?t=2&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)
2 - [NY Guild](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15249?t=3&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)
3 - [Chicago Tribune](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15250?t=4&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20221208-3687-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=5&refcode2=3687_2526796_w5N7VE&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221208-3687-P_ORG_ANO_LAB&t=6&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3687%2E2526796%2Ew5N7VE)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Sign the Petition - No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion!
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3noi76bbjust9cvnh24qhutkm17faou5hr62bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**Please, right now, sign this No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion emergency petition to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuf8n32pn57fc4d02db6ecn81d4p2g4r2rav0mdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z221acl4132j8104puu3o6r2ccsjeeor0k71m03o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn -- especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon!

[**You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1cqpdt3h7t77ok3dvugp9pa3a1l073jsvh6h8ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs)

President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions.

Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before.

If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die.

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5assi83l9h01aiol3f85g6hvfc6g4jom0ev0lso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsghae7noa72hnpactb5tg4cjar3mqh5ikmieuqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clj61or4c9h2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfj98rh3qeedvlt9ajgd3k386jrqjvhjmrmafbsg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1imco73chh649fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?URGENT=20MESSAGE=20=28Re=3A=20NYT=29=E2=9D=97=EF=B8=8F?=
subject: Do NOT read the New York Times today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier to Entry PAC
body:
Friends: Do NOT read the New York Times today.
| | | [](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=d54d1d1f2a&e=007b353608)
---
Friends,

We have held off on sending emails recently because we have been recouping from a long, two-year election cycle. And we hope that you're also getting a moment to breathe.

**But today, there is something happening that’s too important to not share with you.

** The New York Times staff— everyone from journalists to custodians—over 1,800 strong is striking over inadequate pay among other issues related to benefits and working conditions.

We are asking you to refrain from opening NYT articles today, engaging with social media content, and listening to NYT podcasts. Engagement with NYT content is what drives their profit, which has exclusively benefitted those at the top -- **_on the backs of workers.

_** **I repeat: Do NOT read or support the NYT today.**

Please spread the word to your friends and neighbors as many are not aware of the strike. Barrier To Entry PAC is proud to be a pro-labor organization founded upon pro-worker values. Thanks for doing your part.

In Solidarity,
**_\-- Megan
_** Digital Director, B/E PAC Rapid Response Desk
[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=a74612b955&e=007b353608)

body:
Today, a website was launched detailing all the highlights of the Governor’s 8 years – housed in one new and permanent place: TheDuceyYears.com | |
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,
“Arizona’s Governor for Tough Times” – That’s what the _Arizona Republic_ said 8 years ago when the newspaper endorsed Governor Ducey. And what an 8 years it’s been. There are 25 days left of Governor Ducey’s term, and [in the words of the great George Will](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=d978420b4f&e=55d4e2f84a), Governor Ducey is now “the nation’s most successful governor of the 21st century.” Today, a website was launched detailing all the highlights of the Governor’s 8 years – housed in one new and permanent place:[ TheDuceyYears.com](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=31447a8f40&e=55d4e2f84a) On this website, you can search by year and by policy for a full catalog of all that has been accomplished with the partnership, of course, of some great people, including many legislators, leaders in the business community and with your help and support. TheDuceyYears.com archive details just how far our state has come since 2014. Some highlights:
* The economy has undergone transformation. Jobs are plentiful and major companies have moved here or expanded here, capped by TSMC’s recent announcement. Arizona’s economy is on a roll.
* Arizona has 5,000 fewer government jobs than it did in December 2014 before Governor Ducey took office, but nearly[ 500,000 additional](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=99b1eda0bd&e=55d4e2f84a) private sector jobs. All while our population has grown by more than 1/2 a million people.
* Since 2015, Arizona has added more than 496,200 jobs, including 39,000 manufacturing jobs and 63,000 construction jobs.
* Between 2015 and 2020, the state's poverty rate declined from 17.4% to 12.8%, tied for the fastest poverty rate decrease during that time. And the number of people in poverty in Arizona dropped by more than 226,000 between 2015 and 2020, while the number of unemployed Arizonans has dropped by 61,059 over the same period.
* We’ve got the highest Rainy Day Savings Fund balance in state history = $1.4 billion. Meanwhile, we are home to the lowest flat tax in the nation at 2.5%.
* The State has paid down total debt obligations owed through FY 2031 by $3.3 billion, leaving the State with only $603 million owed through FY 2031.
* And don’t forget: K-12 education funding. Total additional = more than $11 billion. Per-pupil funding is at a record high.

There is so much more, from school choice to civics, and tele-health to water. Governor Ducey’s leadership has undoubtedly had an impact on our state. Please join us in celebrating his accomplishments. Thank you for all you’ve done and continue to do for the State of Arizona. From, Team Ducey
---

body:

| Peter,

In case you missed the news, Abigail was just elected to the House's new Democratic leadership position for "battleground" districts like VA-07!
---
| | _**Spanberger elected 'battleground' leader of House Democrats**_

"Spanberger has been elected as the Battleground Leadership Representative for the U.S. House Democratic Caucus. It's a new position aimed at advising party leaders about issues that are critical to 'battleground' districts."

_\- NBC 29_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cx0TaKNuqDgBgCuLRnrKWutNIyH_NXVcgj4eR7Mvd-I=/JkGRQhjX53lOZHwoI5EdsEUyfudIoRAexJxumWCp8FA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221208-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Throughout the 2022 election cycle, political experts rightfully called VA-07 "the bellwether" for national midterm results. Our race was always considered one of the most consequential when it came to determining the makeup of the House.

Thanks to your support, Abigail will be a leading voice framing the future of the Democratic party in this new position. She will now carry the distinct responsibility of advocating for the top concerns from swing districts to House leadership. As an extremely effective bipartisan leader, Abigail will continue to deliver for us.

It's moments like these that reaffirm what's possible with our grassroots network's commitment.

We're excited to see what Abigail accomplishes next, and we hope you will continue to support her as we begin preparing for the 2023-24 cycle. Team Spanberger

Peter, As I prepare to begin my first term in Congress, I’m reaching out to get your input on the most pressing issues facing our communities today. I launched this campaign on the promise that I would represent the needs of the people of my home district here in Illinois’ 17th. I intend to keep that pledge in Congress, Peter. We focused on a range of issues in our winning campaign -- from lowering the cost of prescription drugs to combating climate change and protecting reproductive freedoms. Now, because of your votes, we have an opportunity to address all of those issues and more in the coming term. **I want to know which issues are top-of-mind for you today. What’s bugging you, and what can I do to help?** **[Will you fill out this survey to give us your thoughts on what we should focus on over these next two years? Your feedback matters a great deal to me.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkc_LuhNMcusU0-Z0R0kweVdd-gp7sadfi_qgoObScM1AdPU0p0CFiBcwBYg81FnyfCwjZXIGCH3MDL_iaRKfbaKCtqZtl2cdsZrD7KQCzczBYx_C2fKl-s36yElRTecq_yGD8YrNY3kyKDjBZTwFDncR_2DvBqu8yMDjuVYM9orOynZqJu2DDIU3BKZyTenqMByNiSOH2yD2vYtpmBctperFtmiDmf5C5QFYy67_5YeufvT5-bKXNxFxou6D8kxbaVfRAiZ8PoQlILUxJ2fE420m0bWBdFVebLHzFDM40jyP4Z2m3eOfbbh31yHPrgPNU/3rt/f2Qt5RxDT76xUsjKcHRTRQ/h1/81Pgaltebt1t-wUfEpkgr3eetqI53TqYvkVivmqS8oA)**

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL . We focused on a range of issues in our winning campaign -- from lowering the cost of prescription drugs to combating climate change and protecting reproductive freedoms. Now, because of your votes, we have an opportunity to address all of those issues and more in the coming term. I want to know which issues are top-of-mind for you today. What’s bugging you, and what can I do to help? You’ve trusted me for years as a meteorologist, and now I want to show that you can trust me to listen to your input and fight for you in Congress. body:
I’m personally overjoyed

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732918/382617955/234291150?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20221208_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjFlZGFlYy01MDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u6JAyl3lVtHvTtI4OR0ivr88fjJu7221_ZZMvjT6Wg=) **Peter, I just voted to pass the Respect for Marriage Act, sending it to President Biden’s desk for his final signature.**

As the first out LGBTQ+ person of color in Congress, I have faced homophobic attacks and been filled with anxieties about the future for our LGBTQ+ community – especially young people.

**That’s why I’m personally overjoyed to see the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act** – which enshrines LGBTQ+ and interracial marriage into law.

**I’ve lived in an America that banned gay marriage. And I’m not going back.** Because we all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – _no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender._

And Peter, I want to thank you for being in this fight with me. I couldn’t have done it without your support.

Sincerely and gratefully,

Congressman Mark Takano | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732919/382617956/234291150?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20221208_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjFlZGFlYy01MDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0u6JAyl3lVtHvTtI4OR0ivr88fjJu7221_ZZMvjT6Wg=)

That’s why I’m personally overjoyed to see the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act – which enshrines LGBTQ+ and interracial marriage into law. I’ve lived in an America that banned gay marriage. And I’m not going back. Because we all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender. And Peter, I want to thank you for being in this fight with me. I couldn’t have done it without your support. Sincerely and gratefully, Congressman Mark Takano | = | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and join Team Takano in the fight for progressive policies, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

Can we count on your help pulling off a little surprise, friend? **It's Kirsten's birthday on Friday, and we're hoping this team will join in on making it extra special.**
If there's one thing we know about Kirsten, it's this: She is _fiercely_ passionate about helping women break down barriers and take their rightful place at the decision-making table. That's why she launched Off the Sidelines, which is dedicated to helping proud Democratic women candidates run for Congress and win.
**We can't think of anything she'd love more for her birthday than to find out this grassroots team raised $25,000 for Off the Sidelines – all to help elect more incredible Democratic women to Congress next election cycle. Please, will you chip in what you can now?**
**[Please, donate $5 or more to Off the Sidelines now to help elect more progressive, Democratic women to Congress in honor of Kirsten's birthday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732926/382618019/1036508104?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3826-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODFlZGFlYy01MDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NHQnpwIkzT_uzyTZjpYEtRnA8P_Ol_ApdK2y0eLsYA=)**
In the face of a GOP-controlled House and a razor-thin Democratic Senate majority, electing more Democratic women isn't just meaningful to Kirsten. It's critical to the issues we care about most. From defending our fundamental reproductive rights to fighting for paid family leave, we _need_ more women's voices in the halls of Congress speaking out for the future we want to see.
**[So please, if you share Kirsten's commitment to supporting women across the country who are running for office to move our nation forward, please donate $5 or more to Off the Sidelines in honor of her birthday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732927/382618020/1036508104?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3826-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODFlZGFlYy01MDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NHQnpwIkzT_uzyTZjpYEtRnA8P_Ol_ApdK2y0eLsYA=)**

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5eIHN2y8JIff8aslXMl6KDs77h9V2g5FTqnutr9G-xZPamRuA4B9IiTTmQA9U8Ks-Jkett2kc3LwsTpCm1s64HGYTUnruUcxn9QUm9Ebp0BxkQz1pp0tcmY9dyT6GRVCTVDByeb-ZpGBbkFur4WIx6nYf1WYixNBztHmBH96uSBT4Gpm7GGvu33cnJ0f0GSrgwwp_3c_oa3ivjHGKdjmr3VWMxjPV-MCFp15VHa1bbguzZcbQOBegsIz6EjedGzg_yf4A2rG2ADkBwkCjf_9t-ui7O-gk-fwF5cuW__oOnHvojLseokRru7Lh0-EyMV-205q8sh9nGg0mvo2djm9Dy6kPEfDT9tbF3J75no8WlIp/3rt/Y3Q1EKnITKOmMSLkmlsxmA/h3/STUpepOsbW9e5rC4TMIMhzLfbT2gk1_LBDJ7qxRKKpo) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5eIHN2y8JIff8aslXMl6KDs77h9V2g5FTqnutr9G-xZPamRuA4B9IiTTmQA9U8Ks-IQYQNvcB3MiSHVJy-Yo5CoiHp-miQXwSYfK_lSo3eE2AHFNsnUZLtlYhg4etezm2Rq76fvPGRZwh4n5YP1z1bjEdnLtsm8pWpN1qLVw7YQgz_sgeMnIRb07dFXiwbKa9V5t-_rmSzIGlHgjJFUn1hpXP73DkCOMyUZvn6KdxdhWy7AYJod9B9IY4GKS-8sEOT0tyx_H-IvmzVI3gmZnAwRsCN9x06_p6FT3fVP77SihtApuj__IT-p1-Uu75WS1VjQeFQxq_DdAFdnW5Qj-qYibYrrL1RRdxKvtiannlqvI/3rt/Y3Q1EKnITKOmMSLkmlsxmA/h4/GLjClkQI8FDNUhfFY27KZaVEEXY-uJc9EN2-Oao4GSc) Throughout the 2021-2022 election cycle, The Collective PAC endorsed 252 candidates across the country and invested approximately $700,000 through direct contributions to those campaigns and bundled $333,823 for federal and statewide candidates — totaling over one million dollars. In addition to financial support, The Collective PAC organized 10 text banks for high priority races in Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Minnesota, Ohio, New York, Nevada, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Through these organizing efforts, volunteers contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters (those who voted previously but did not vote in 2020 or 2018) to encourage them to turn out to the polls. “The Collective PAC is proud to have played a role in the election of 123 Black candidates in cities and states across the country as we anticipate more election victories in the weeks ahead. These elected public servants are part of a new generation of Black leaders that are stepping up to serve at a time when their voices and lived experiences can help shape public policy that will improve the lives of all Americans. We know that our government is more efficient and responsive to the needs of its constituents when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities.

We’re honored to be a part of the legacy of building Black political power as we continue to take steps forward to close the representation gap of Black elected leadership at all levels of government.” [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5eIHN2y8JIff8aslXMl6KDs77h9V2g5FTqnutr9G-xZPamRuA4B9IiTTmQA9U8Ks-CyXq10_mrloWu2FQ42JcxHxRxlWv7z6kQ35SHKf0X6YeRGmSXJzcQp3O5_H0jc0P5eYrc5GMJBfG3wXsGzeEykWUaSJIwag0h0X08EregulvXWorRtqCsliaARVlukdrP82Ks6bY1ICgApC5fxT6VeVpLEsbyHe-NDeLXcndN9Of8H9nlXVOHlXKBCJsXRXix6XYziy5CS0cnGeQoqg0YrUwWYJPrrvrQn7OMXDStT9zvLQjjT6HNDK2kPnfjOrit2HFWU99vu23MHt_Tt-3AjVBFGzNVsEoctNP3IiZFKd/3rt/Y3Q1EKnITKOmMSLkmlsxmA/h8/AB5iLh95xVToM5eYGVgcxZqqZZDgGMQV316uIKYPenc) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5eIHN2y8JIff8aslXMl6KDs77h9V2g5FTqnutr9G-xZPamRuA4B9IiTTmQA9U8Ks-LA0co--cUR3so5j7l69Na1O_DVs9NWwpHyzgvHVDjW0rY7ZJQYq5B6k51gnhwGGkd0zadCieFlqP0u9QTo0Qjrp-CTwtDm1iYIhkQYSNX294sjWi5lr7EFl-lKn8O8wcLEc4V8TTSC5OTc_9HwGPccAhfTq6-31dmULjwp1ZWYku1CgDakdhzk9X36bEVxnyjcL9avJ5PLMPXxH37HoP1-AVY1qqRpHte5fpWhqVQVAgYkyA0L0tujr1TliksS8yrJ9hYqAt2LGkXbHx50auqz3qlsUjVokUEPyLnZBK8rC/3rt/Y3Q1EKnITKOmMSLkmlsxmA/h9/7fMZJsyRE63q_rNzI1vswNqIZDHQhs8Wpz8Y3uriloU) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5eIHN2y8JIff8aslXMl6KDs77h9V2g5FTqnutr9G-xZPamRuA4B9IiTTmQA9U8Ks-Bwaf1ttLNzPdEO4SIC2oGgGgrOzjcgb3dh6E6rwyAMNaK5rCYi3TezV_hRl5kEEtvneWVZ04S3RBmRSKZg30WH1oe0kbpCItddmY2rqzTypkerffeeZMIKv1RODl6PrAOyr6_rSzGCUwGu2946gsOhUuLgyX6dOf1raj4vvnKRX7aMXbI7X526dFb-K37kJWGVESCwhH602O3rAIBnv0vYZvYF0Viqd5_jlW-GiJYQkgPKF3kif2zbTgvi5ZUJort_A72P1AbPtxSUBhXCe_F5lZGOKOLdqP5Uyt58wBvF3/3rt/Y3Q1EKnITKOmMSLkmlsxmA/h10/bmmJxlJQ-DqtTMx2b342WgtAf8ae_F4VYwMe0EeHiyI) **The Collective in the News**

clean_body: | | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Among the 106 election night victories, history makers included the first Black Governor of Maryland, Wes Moore; first Black Attorneys General of Massachusetts and Maryland, Andrea Campbell and Anthony Brown, respectively; Generation Z’s first Congressional member, Maxwell Frost (FL - 10); Los Angeles’ first woman and second Black mayor, Karen Bass; and Long Beach, California’s first Black mayor, Rex Richardson. After Senator Warnock’s re-election win on Tuesday, The Collective PAC helped to elect a total of 123 candidates throughout this election season. Throughout the 2021-2022 election cycle, The Collective PAC endorsed 252 candidates across the country and invested approximately $700,000 through direct contributions to those campaigns and bundled $333,823 for federal and statewide candidates — totaling over one million dollars. In addition to financial support, The Collective PAC organized 10 text banks for high priority races in Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Minnesota, Ohio, New York, Nevada, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Through these organizing efforts, volunteers contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters (those who voted previously but did not vote in 2020 or 2018) to encourage them to turn out to the polls. Founders of The Collective PAC, Quentin James and Stefanie Brown James, released the following statement: “The Collective PAC is proud to have played a role in the election of 123 Black candidates in cities and states across the country as we anticipate more election victories in the weeks ahead. These elected public servants are part of a new generation of Black leaders that are stepping up to serve at a time when their voices and lived experiences can help shape public policy that will improve the lives of all Americans. We know that our government is more efficient and responsive to the needs of its constituents when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities. We’re honored to be a part of the legacy of building Black political power as we continue to take steps forward to close the representation gap of Black elected leadership at all levels of government.” The Collective in the News | | ---|--- Politico - The 19th News - The Grio - NPR - Delaware Coast Press - Capital B - The 19th News - Capital B - The New York Times - Times - U.S. News & World Report - The Associated Press - The New York Times - The New York Times - The Washington Post - MSNBC - Thank you for being a part of The Collective Fam! Be sure to follow us on social media (Twitter/IG: @collectivepac) for the latest updates and join us at an upcoming virtual event. Also, don't hesitate to email us at info@collectivepac.org if you have any questions or need additional information. | | ---|---|--- The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Keith Ellison
subject: Need your help by NYE
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Team, It was an honor to fight by your side over the past year to overcome the most difficult test this movement has ever faced. Team,
It was an honor to fight by your side over the past year to overcome the most difficult test this movement has ever faced. I am deeply grateful for your support.
This election was tough. Millions of dollars were spent to sow division, hate, and fear. But we stood strong. We were positive, and voters responded.

Like all tough campaigns, we couldn’t risk leaving anything on the table on Election Day, and that means we still have some final expenses to settle up before the New Year. I know Mark from our fundraising team already reached out, but I’m following up directly because this is extremely important.
**To cover the final costs of our hard-fought campaign, we need to raise $50,000 online by New Year’s Eve. We’re starting at essentially $0 right now, so we have a long way to go.**
But here’s the good news: According to my campaign team, you’re still eligible to make a refundable $50 ($100 for couples) this year with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program.
[**Team, you have until December 31 to take advantage of your 2022 PCR before it resets. Don’t leave it on the table! Make a refundable $50 donation today so we can make up the difference and continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55726749/382587842/1344830101?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDllNDQyOC0yYTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qe-IyXNqQMEovNNAyJJiglQn9g0Z5V50B_Q3DbTv80=)

| [ Biden Leaves Behind Marine Veteran In Prisoner Exchange that Freed Brittney Griner ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PD4bh8%2bxJ5Fyd6MRZP5l7A&sysid=1)
---
[ Joe Biden has left U.S. Marine veteran Paul Whelan in Russian custody, choosing instead to secure the release of WNBA star Brittney Griner on Thursday. Whelan has been in Russian custody since 2018, held on espionage charges, while Griner has been detained since February after authorities discovered cannabis oil in her luggage. Biden had sought the release of both Americans in an exchange for notorious Russian arms dealer, Viktor Bout. But now it is clear that Biden was prepared to leave Whelan behind, prioritizing the exchange for Griner alone. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D4PwNjxet1kdmto3D26kNg&sysid=1)
