name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Bess=2C=20VP=20at=20Heritage=20Action?=
subject: Elon Musk calls ESG “the devil” - here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
| | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a6062a2d11&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over. **** _Have you heard of ESG?_ **** This radical agenda represents...
* **Racial quotas in the workplace**
* **Cancel culture for “wrongthink”**
* **Corporate donations for abortion**
* **Pushing the trans issue onto children**
* **Critical Race Theory**
* **Corporate welfare**
* **Anti-oil, “green new deal” mandates**
* **A Social Credit Score**

... all in one MASSIVE package. It’s being pushed by “woke” corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. **But don’t just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG “the devil.”**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b7e75ab51d&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. _The S &P kicked Musk’s Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk’s company being an electric car company._ _This shows what ESG scores are really about—punishing political enemies for the Left!_ Even though Elon Musk has a “green” auto company, a major ESG “ratings” organization gave Tesla a low score. **Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want!** This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. **At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG.** It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda!
---
| | [**HELP US FIGHT BACK TODAY >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2839f4ae8e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Our **ESG Hurts** campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means:
* Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG.
* Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG.

**In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda.**
* **MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock**
* **SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock**
* **LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm**
* **FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG**

**These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda!** Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. **We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023–**** _and winning_****. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda?** Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. [_**Donate to Heritage Action today and keep ESG from Hurting America >>>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=085fac3f82&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**DONATE $100**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=abaebd4866&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d615fa580c&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DONATE $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=87d2c7cbc1&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | If Americans don’t learn the TRUTH about ESG – and lawmakers don’t put a stop to it – this agenda will take over our country. Heritage Action, will NEVER stop fighting until ESG is defeated, no matter what kind of opposition we face. **And we need grassroots Americans like YOU to stand with us against this radical agenda.**
---
| | [_**< < CHIP IN TODAY >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9352217e66&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **When you contribute to the ESG Hurts campaign, you’re helping us...**
* Fund explainers about ESG and how it works
* Fund our activists fighting ESG on the front lines
* Fund our work implementing anti-ESG policies at the state level

We would really appreciate your support, Fellow Conservative. [**_Donate whatever you can today to support our fight against the WOKE ESG agenda in America! >>_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b1572d8c95&e=fdefed58de) Thank you,

Garrett Bess Vice President, Heritage Action

This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG. It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda! | | | | Our ESG Hurts campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means: Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG. Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG. In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda. MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda! Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023–** and winning. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda? Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. | | | | If Americans don’t learn the TRUTH about ESG – and lawmakers don’t put a stop to it – this agenda will take over our country. Heritage Action, will NEVER stop fighting until ESG is defeated, no matter what kind of opposition we face. And we need grassroots Americans like YOU to stand with us against this radical agenda. | | | | When you contribute to the ESG Hurts campaign, you’re helping us... Fund explainers about ESG and how it works Fund our activists fighting ESG on the front lines * Fund our work implementing anti-ESG policies at the state level We would really appreciate your support, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, Garrett Bess Vice President, Heritage Action | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. Donations are not tax deductible. By participating, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (51776-info.com) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Heritage Action to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. When selecting a recurring donation, Heritage Action for America will process this donation every month on the day of the month that you set up the recurring gift in the amount that you specify using the method of payment that you identified. You can cancel or change this donation at any time by contacting us at 1-(202) 548-5280. This authorization shall remain in effect until you notify Heritage Action for America and Heritage Action has had reasonable time to act on it. A record of each debit will appear on your bank statement. You have the right to instruct your bank to reverse any and all debits. | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. name: Roger Stone
subject: The StoneZONE, by Roger Stone
body:
| [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=0&link=795674d8671d419e9647272907b69e42)
---
| **ROGER STONE: Adam Schiff Can 't Stop Lying** Rep. Kevin McCarthy, or any Republican who might become Speaker of the U.S. House, should most definitely block Schiff from serving on any House Committee where he is able to obtain, twist, and leak classified information. The Nation's future security depends on it. [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=1&link=f74808d7b9cf4c22abe90bd6ff3d6911) **U.S. House Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy said that in the event he became Speaker of the House, Congressman Eric Swalwell, Congressmen Adam Schiff and Congresswoman Ilhan Omar would be blocked from serving on sensitive committees.** Swalwell, you recall, was caught in a romantic liaison with a Red Chinese spy who went by the name "Fang Fang" (also known as Christine Fang), who successfully placed a staffer on the payroll in Swalwell's office. As a member of the House Intelligence Committee, Swalwell continues to be privy to classified information regarding our national security, yet Speaker Pelosi has refused to address this security breach. Sadly, Fang Fang died in a mysterious plane crash reported on March 22nd, 2022. Adam Schiff's reaction to McCarthy's pledge was more predictable. He lied. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=2&link=0f34df65a67c421fa5f439f191a1e514). **Was the Pandemic a Massive Coup Attempt by the Pharma Mafia?** Part 1 of a 3 part comprehensive synopsis of the book Presidential Takedown- the explosive testimony of one of the Warp Speed doctors. [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=3&link=8ac426e86e7445f98797c16de0f49eba) **You would think everyone would rush out to buy this book, but the harsh reality is, many people simply won 't sit down and read an almost 200 page book these days. Sad but true...** However, I am here to assist. I preordered this book when I learned of its context and author, and have been dying to dive into it. Let me just say: I was blown away by the Intro alone. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=4&link=f2c2217f0fec41048af0a527e9280680). **Twitter files reveal familiar name in Hunter Biden laptop scandal: James Baker** However, one familiar name immediately popped out in the first batch of documents released through journalist Matt Taibbi: James Baker. For many, James Baker is fast becoming the Kevin Bacon of the Russian collusion scandals. [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=5&link=1f4d7aad20c14827b956728429495f8a) **As thousands of Twitter documents are released on the company 's infamous censorship program, much has been confirmed about the use of back channels by Biden and Democratic officials to silence critics on the social media platform. However, one familiar name immediately popped out in the first batch of documents released through journalist Matt Taibbi: James Baker. For many, James Baker is fast becoming the Kevin Bacon of the Russian collusion scandals.** Baker has been featured repeatedly in the Russian investigations launched by the Justice Department, including the hoax involving the Russian Alfa Bank. When Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussmann wanted to plant the bizarre false claim of a secret communications channel between the Trump campaign and the Kremlin, Baker was his go-to, speed-dial contact. (Baker would later testify at Sussmann's trial). Baker's name also appeared prominently in controversies related to the other Russian-related FBI allegations against Trump. He was effectively forced out due to his role and reportedly found himself under criminal investigation. He became a defender of the Russian investigations despite findings of biased and even criminal conduct. He was also a frequent target of Donald Trump on social media, including Twitter. Baker responded with public criticism of Trump for his "false narratives." After leaving the FBI, Twitter seemed eager to hire Baker as deputy general counsel. Ironically, Baker soon became involved in another alleged back channel with a presidential campaign. This time it was Twitter that maintained the non-public channels with the Biden campaign (and later the White House). Baker soon weighed in with the same signature bias that characterized the Russian investigations. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=6&link=2281fbc2d7f0447ab21a5e270ad3b291). [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=7&link=b406e6829d024041873ef9c983d5a467) **Roger Stone** is a political strategist and pundit and a long-time political advisor and friend of President Donald Trump. Stone was a [victim](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=8&link=09b1602607cd448ba450dd1f438a3750) of the Mueller witch-hunt and was charged with lying to Congress in order to pressure him into testifying against the President. Stone refused. After Stone's trial was corrupted by a biased Judge, a corrupt Jury Forewoman and a stacked jury and prosecutors sought to incarcerate Stone in a Covid 19 infested prison in violation of all current legal precedents and DOJ policy, President Donald Trump pardoned Roger Stone on December 23, 2020. On November 3, 2020, at midnight, the US Justice Department by court order released the long-hidden sections of the Mueller Report in which the Special Counsel admitted that his office with its unlimited legal authority and unlimited budget had found "no factual evidence" to tie Roger Stone to Russian Collusion, Wikileaks collaboration or the alleged theft of John Podesta's e-mail. Stone is a New York Times Bestselling author and has returned to political commentary at [StoneZone.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=9&link=7e08e4c0709040e79cdf1a41f5386033). Follow Roger Stone on social media **@TruthSocial**** -******[ https://Truthsocial.com/@RealRogerStone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=10&link=b04f6c26cc6548158dd1ee5256c1b618) / @ **GAB -** [https://gab.com/RogerJStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=11&link=9e6814de246b40509477a26d8fbcf9aa) / **Telegram:** [https://t.me/RogerStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=12&link=bf6da66903274cd29c5e0d7592a13043) / **BitChute:** [https://bitchute.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=13&link=fc6a4a6754384199aa6da139d67468b8) / **Rumble:** [https://rumble.com/user/realrogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=14&link=11b1c4436fb74b69b941546af7d59efa) / **Cameo: **[https://cameo.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=15&link=6cb069c3a780404b93433a2e32528157) Watch Roger Stone's show, The StoneZONE live every weekday at 5pm EST at [https://StoneZONE.live](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=2lvvk0t78do31hdynr&linkid=16&link=25497433c6904ab7b93dd99ff820a15f).

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign our petition: Stop Wall Street from buying houses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55728198/382594811/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWMzMmEwNC0zMjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cxtAQF0bgTHGnR0FHQhBdCW-LfQNmlZ1RF3dkT7Yq6M=&emci=da811724-3177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=41c32a04-3277-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The affordable housing crisis is impacting nearly every community, every neighborhood. Rents are going up almost everywhere, even as families struggle to make ends meet. Home prices, especially for first-time home buyers, keep climbing. It's like there's some invisible force driving up rents and home prices. It's not your imagination. _It's Wall Street._ All across America, hedge funds and private equity firms are buying up housing. They use their vast fortunes to outbid everyday Americans looking to buy homes. And because their investors demand Wall Street-style returns, they're driving up rents and cutting back on repairs. I've got a plan. And I'd like your support, to help me demonstrate to my colleagues that we have to take action. _Here's how my plan works: _**Ban big financial companies from buying up residential housing.** It's not complicated! clean_body: | | | | The affordable housing crisis is impacting nearly every community, every neighborhood. Rents are going up almost everywhere, even as families struggle to make ends meet. Home prices, especially for first-time home buyers, keep climbing. It's like there's some invisible force driving up rents and home prices. It's not your imagination. It's Wall Street. All across America, hedge funds and private equity firms are buying up housing. They use their vast fortunes to outbid everyday Americans looking to buy homes. And because their investors demand Wall Street-style returns, they're driving up rents and cutting back on repairs. I've got a plan. And I'd like your support, to help me demonstrate to my colleagues that we have to take action. Here's how my plan works: Ban big financial companies from buying up residential housing. It's not complicated! The homes in our neighborhoods should be for ordinary people, not Wall Street. It's a big problem and a complicated issue — but the solution is simple: Make Wall Street stop buying homes and jacking up the cost of housing. Onward! body:
Add your name

| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Raising the debt ceiling, once considered a routine duty of Congress to pay our bills, is now used by Republicans as an opportunity to threaten and extort concessions from Democrats. The GOP is once again up to their dirty tricks. They recently threatened, if they capture a majority in the House of Representatives, to hold the debt ceiling hostage while demanding cuts in essential programs like Social Security and Medicaid. If America defaults on its financial obligations, it will cause unprecedented damage to our economy--damage that would be entirely self-inflicted and avoidable. [**Sign the petition: Democrats must raise the debt ceiling now to keep the government funded and stop the GOP from holding our economy hostage.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T646bd223-1726-4987-baa2-4e516e913970/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff29dd33-6a91-4e1d-9204-021ebf587782/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | If Democrats raise the debt ceiling during this lame duck session, they can deprive the GOP of a chance to hold the country hostage over the next two years. Democrats must stand up to Republican obstruction before it starts and use their respective powers to end this Republican manufactured crisis before it begins. [**Sign the petition: Democrats must raise the debt ceiling now to keep the government funded and stop the GOP from holding our economy hostage.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T331ef5e1-315e-490c-bffa-b95a4f64f4ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: Add your name | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Raising the debt ceiling, once considered a routine duty of Congress to pay our bills, is now used by Republicans as an opportunity to threaten and extort concessions from Democrats. The GOP is once again up to their dirty tricks. They recently threatened, if they capture a majority in the House of Representatives, to hold the debt ceiling hostage while demanding cuts in essential programs like Social Security and Medicaid. If America defaults on its financial obligations, it will cause unprecedented damage to our economy--damage that would be entirely self-inflicted and avoidable. | | | | | | If Democrats raise the debt ceiling during this lame duck session, they can deprive the GOP of a chance to hold the country hostage over the next two years. Democrats must stand up to Republican obstruction before it starts and use their respective powers to end this Republican manufactured crisis before it begins. | | | | | | | | Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. body:
the MAGA right wants to relitigate and undermine the crucial work this bipartisan effort has done to uncover the truth |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734059/382644974/950074808?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg4M2ZjOS01ZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKa7oKFeMlAgI924rSf6v4CVuXk5imHZ7dJsweQu1PI=)
Hey team, Not that he ever makes much sense, but Kevin McCarthy’s new stunt is...particularly stupid. In a letter he sent to the House January 6th Committee last week, **Kevin McCarthy indicated he and his band of MAGA Republicans plan to investigate the Jan. 6th Committee’s investigation.** You read that correctly. **McCarthy and the GOP want to... _investigate_ ...an _investigation..._** Despite how comically dumb that sounds as a concept, it is still easy to infer what it means: **the MAGA right wants to relitigate and undermine the crucial work this bipartisan effort has done to uncover the truth about the attack on the Capitol on January 6th, and try to manufacture proof that it was nothing but a political game to attack Trump.** MAGA Republicans have always been masters of projection, but this is next level. This charade from McCarthy is just the newest installment of Republicans plotting to destroy all avenues to hold Trump and his allies accountable for trying to destroy our democracy. And we have to fight back. [**Can you chip in to help us stand up to McCarthy and his MAGA Republican majority and their corrupt stunts in the new Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734060/382644975/950074808?refcode=E19752-20221208-Jan6Investigation-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg4M2ZjOS01ZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKa7oKFeMlAgI924rSf6v4CVuXk5imHZ7dJsweQu1PI=) | [STAND UP TO MCCARTHY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734061/382644976/950074808?refcode=E19752-20221208-Jan6Investigation-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg4M2ZjOS01ZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKa7oKFeMlAgI924rSf6v4CVuXk5imHZ7dJsweQu1PI=)

Rather than focus their time and energy on delivering for the American people, _McCarthy and the rest of the GOP would rather perform hollow stunts that obstruct accountability, score them points on Fox News and distract from their various attacks on our civil liberties. _
We can’t say we’re surprised, but it’s disgraceful nonetheless, and we cannot stand for it.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: They’re using the Supreme Court to undermine democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
The Supreme Court just heard a case that could upend our democracy. |
#
---
Peter, **[Yesterday, I joined Errol Louis on NY1’s “Inside City Hall” to discuss a case in front of the Supreme Court that has enormous implications for our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734081/382645972/1103279631?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S3_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTliNzI1OC01ZTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goZMgy-ZXZdR5qGD1d5xIy1fhGdTPqEWM2X0WG3XrEU=&emci=0e3223f7-5577-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5e9b7258-5e77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13556823)** If you didn’t catch my interview, here’s a quick explainer: North Carolina Republicans are asking the Court to reinstate an extreme, partisan gerrymander rendered unconstitutional by the state’s Supreme Court. Their argument is based on the so-called “independent state legislature” theory, a fringe legal argument backed by $90 million in conservative dark money that says state legislatures have the sole authority to establish election laws _without any review by state courts._ This is nothing more than a continuation of Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn the 2020 election. **If the Court sides with Republicans in this case, it would mark a stunning, unconscionable overhaul of our democratic institutions — allowing politicians to restrict access to the ballot, draw egregiously gerrymandered districts, and even decide who is elected to office — including the President of the United States.** Peter, the far-right majority on this Supreme Court has shown us time and again that it’s willing to place ideological purity over our democracy. We can’t just hope they will do the right thing. We must rein in the partisan activism of a far-right Supreme Court. Supreme Court justices are the only judges not beholden to the judicial code of ethics, which must change in order to restore Americans’ trust in our judiciary and ensure that they are held accountable for their conflicts of interest, just like any other public servant. **If you’re with me, please add your name and demand accountability for this out-of-control Supreme Court — we’ve got to act NOW.** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734082/382645973/1709799342?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S3_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTliNzI1OC01ZTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goZMgy-ZXZdR5qGD1d5xIy1fhGdTPqEWM2X0WG3XrEU=&emci=0e3223f7-5577-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5e9b7258-5e77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13556823)
---
Thank you for standing with me to defend our democracy.
— Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55734083/382645974/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S3_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTliNzI1OC01ZTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goZMgy-ZXZdR5qGD1d5xIy1fhGdTPqEWM2X0WG3XrEU=&emci=0e3223f7-5577-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5e9b7258-5e77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: There’s something you should know about AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

From the moment we launched Justice Democrats in 2016, we’ve always been
crystal clear on our mission: to recruit and elect a diverse slate of
people-first progressives who will fight to make our government work for
all of us.

But since we have helped AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, and
many more to victory, opposition has only grown to our critical, unique
work.

A new organization has fixated on Justice Democrats, attacking our
candidates at every turn, and spending millions in an attempt to defeat
our progressive movement. AIPAC’s Super PAC, United Democracy Project,
will not rest while there are Justice Democrats to target — they are
waging an electoral war on the Squad and anyone who may join them.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123057?refcode=em20221208-26457&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]We’re already preparing for the next election cycle and drawing up
long-term plans for our next slate of Justice Democrats. Our success will
be determined by the resources we have to fight back against AIPAC’s
certain attacks — can you chip in $3 to help us build our
defenses early?

AIPAC claims to be a “bipartisan” organization, but their Super PAC
“United for Democracy” is a sham. AIPAC has directly invested into
candidates hell-bent on poisoning our democracy while attacking
progressive candidates like Jessica Cisneros and Summer Lee — calling them
“bad Democrats.”

Now, there’s something you should know about AIPAC. There’s a
not-so-secret pipeline from the far-right Republican establishment
directly to AIPAC — where Republican extremists are now pulling the
strings. When Donald Trump lost in 2020, AIPAC sourced a high-level
staffer directly from the Republican National Committee.

Coincidentally, AIPAC endorsed 100+ extremist Republican election deniers
shortly afterwards. Take a look:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123057?refcode=em20221208-26457&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123057?refcode=em20221208-26457&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]Now that you know just how dangerous AIPAC has become, I’m asking you
earnestly: can you make a $3 donation (or any amount) so we
have a fighting chance against their extreme agenda in the upcoming cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123057?refcode=em20221208-26457&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]Contribute $3

I want to be very clear that AIPAC’s rise is a source of major concern and
a grave threat to our movement. AIPAC’s goal is to smear progressive
candidates, manipulate voters, and take down anyone who questions their
extreme agenda.

It’s likely AIPAC will come back next time with even more millions at
their disposal to wield against us. We must be prepared for anything. In
order to match AIPAC’s vast resources, we need donors to invest in us
early — as in right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123057?refcode=em20221208-26457&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]Peter,
will you make a $3
contribution to Justice Democrats for the first time to build our
strength early? With your support, we will have a fighting chance against
AIPAC and the establishment and continue to win for our movement.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221208-26457-footer&t=1026&refcode2=26457_1203867_s04bLq&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=26457%2E1203867%2Es04bLq

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: _ Friend, The Biden Administration has weaponized the Department of Justice. This horrendous abuse of power is the latest in a long series of WITCH HUNTS. Now that I have announced I am running for PRESIDENT of the United States, the corrupt and highly political Justice Department just appointed a radical Left Special Counsel, made up of Trump-haters. We cannot let them get away with this, Friend. We cannot let this happen to our Country. I am one of the most honest and innocent people ever in our Country. They have found NOTHING. I'm calling on my most LOYAL and steadfast supporters to STAND WITH ME against this HOAX. I need YOU to get on the team as an AMERICAN DEFENDER and tell the Left that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. - I've been going through these hoaxes and scams ever since the day I took my famous escalator ride in Trump Tower in 2015. THIS HAS TO END. Our Country is the laughingstock of the World, and Joe Biden is a corrupt and incompetent political hack. I know you agree, Friend, and this is your chance to publicly show where you stand! I'll review a list with the names of the proud Patriots who rushed in their support, and I want to see YOUR name at the TOP. Thank you, Donald J. subject: Help defeat the last MAGA candidate left

body:

| Team,

Now that ballots are counted here in Arizona, and my race is so close, we know we’ll officially be heading to a recount per Arizona law.

**I’m facing the last Trump-endorsed MAGA candidate and election denier left this election cycle, and he’s already teeing up his base to claim fraud.**

**I need your help to fight.** We need to have the resources to fund the best recount team we can get – the best attorneys, recount observers and more.

**[Team, I’m not going to stop fighting until the very end, but we spent every penny we had to try and win this race, and it seems like we needed it. Now, we have to raise more to pay for our recount team. Can you split a donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party today to help us?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wfXsXEtgKz6AfNg-PZtxIa7EvZ3U4KinSUATDX-VNHEgk0E1kzJQ5FikFt-uuRezSYeX1bJCx9YKf13WR_8bi4SaB7aYZuZiATABllQJEwkgPcJ5WgGoqaV877U6mkIVxpsf1cCMwFxOzqEUYY4-Ug-WH_R0GX4Kr6vfEBFiD3vYG-efjVjguvl_XLTwXPvq97GcP19LfgG5PwEl19NBWcOmRq4MJigQuE074ZLenCyph3KMnmTPU9Ktm8KlmcMR9iAS2kkPowyoX5dySHKBVIbkhYIpa3jeQhOL0M7xXDVjPmLf8TcJiCffHvP2GPVoj_JCO0G2tTarmXIxHMm3n6fDKDnMBtYcE2LXu-9g1nYk20FV8AES3R7tZ3H3D1dYht3EE_ePQrhe7eNLaEebNQzyUYCWfaIlBy8D3DoxGLTd8_g0ou0L4wo32slMEI60E/3rt/whtTDRU4RWaZmwLZeZzthA/h1/m-BAT3yqKw5NnaNpvfsFK1wHYCDuysrOsyibPz-LyHw)** [
DONATE ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wfXsXEtgKz6AfNg-PZtxIa7EvZ3U4KinSUATDX-VNHEgk0E1kzJQ5FikFt-uuRezSYeX1bJCx9YKf13WR_8bi4GdK7P47MhR-35mcKitDP_2LiKW0sYvOis7gi8RGzF19zla5bVBHL5iqJ9L84x8ZE6E-FU-VuMOKtmEoNkeTvvMNkjmIY7oDqp5GZmSTxKc78Vk-PJlJuQUaV8EkVmt8LSuHzrGoOMFCa8aRdZbPCL5BhF6_gChlPUB1zxkFBNAmPcuP9DOs2iz0fpDcMfZXO1EOwDFiXP8lFPj8sngBb3UQIPAYhxzms6ZnsGCAnSiyq11UYOFmeZ7qH-uLW6yENN4nxcBytF3GBOCbOSAENkBKf8uZ6Y0a0e2xFmOLPtgqUSxHQyOlB88Gq7NhxFVSE24MQ3xM_DqgVF-HFX7bWds9c-F0rIz2f2a9wyJr67Pc/3rt/whtTDRU4RWaZmwLZeZzthA/h2/8GkDgCffHg4xfYd9yx8yBkl8PilOYiQ_r7kIanao2RI)
My opponent said all year long he wanted to lock up election officials, end vote-by-mail and ensure Trump’s victory when he runs again. This is the last chance for Trump’s MAGA crew to try to make that a reality.

Our opponent said he wanted to change the outcome of the 2020 election if elected Attorney General (not possible, by the way). If he was willing to say that then, there’s no telling what he would attempt if elected – with Kari Lake and Mark Finchem refusing to concede, he could cause all kinds of problems for Gov.-elect Katie Hobbs, and others.

We have to fight with everything we can, because the Republicans know this is their last shot. They won’t go down without a fight. I won’t either, unless we don’t get the resources we need.

**[I know it’s a busy time of year, but if you can split a donation of $10 between AZ Dems and my campaign today, I’d really appreciate it.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wfXsXEtgKz6AfNg-PZtxIa7EvZ3U4KinSUATDX-VNHEgk0E1kzJQ5FikFt-uuRezSYeX1bJCx9YKf13WR_8bi4wHZ1-fWUsa7JmfWR6ObMS1LYy6vD8x87Euk82fiIgkvBY7ScdldPuyowJpDVXj6kI69-VXxuLgCFYPt5bnlkFyDwFm2Z0l1RFyiCjf0BOclfEuGxKh_Jsd42wdrig1XVdykdDqsNZ-xQVQq8swkTnpLwC5oajHyYsUaN8UboSez3A_55WnuThjsLJYStWDzKLb-IGOtCOINQC1B6UedgylZ61z1ycSo9B8k2Dn5ek-4gSm6Eg2oKHh5evcO24zbRs40LLlAqko-h9OCJ1zBMKQ5qDDQOZ00N4t7eaoE96I-E3-Ota_ImosELtSO01Id4Z8Ci2jh-o2dISmFq-XCxBwJ_MTs2jP4xv8NOEyeGA9o/3rt/whtTDRU4RWaZmwLZeZzthA/h3/xbZj7EcR3FXDFLOZL0cbsxxEsTPrMWV06qy6B_qOwA0)**

clean_body: | | | Help fund the recount team | | | Team, Now that ballots are counted here in Arizona, and my race is so close, we know we’ll officially be heading to a recount per Arizona law. I’m facing the last Trump-endorsed MAGA candidate and election denier left this election cycle, and he’s already teeing up his base to claim fraud. I need your help to fight. We need to have the resources to fund the best recount team we can get – the best attorneys, recount observers and more. My opponent said all year long he wanted to lock up election officials, end vote-by-mail and ensure Trump’s victory when he runs again. This is the last chance for Trump’s MAGA crew to try to make that a reality. Our opponent said he wanted to change the outcome of the 2020 election if elected Attorney General (not possible, by the way). If he was willing to say that then, there’s no telling what he would attempt if elected – with Kari Lake and Mark Finchem refusing to concede, he could cause all kinds of problems for Gov.-elect Katie Hobbs, and others. We have to fight with everything we can, because the Republicans know this is their last shot. They won’t go down without a fight. I won’t either, unless we don’t get the resources we need. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Arizona Democratic Party and Kris Mayes and will go through immediately: I’ll fight until the very end to be the Lawyer for the People, Kris Mayes Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. ## Stay up to date with “Beyond the Briefing”...
Through the holiday season, we will be only doing Monday episodes of “Beyond The Briefing,” keeping you up to date on the biggest 5 stories of the week. On Monday’s episode I talked about the twitter files, the drama at the RNC and more.
Got a lot to discuss for Monday’s episode, results of the Georgia runoff, latest in the race for RNC Chairperson, the next installation of the twitter files and more.

name: Peter Welch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This victory is not only a win for Georgia — it’s a win for the future of our democracy.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1217%2E61531%2EryTuQo)
Team,
It’s official: Rev. Raphael Warnock just made history again in Georgia and will return to the U.S. Senate for another six years, expanding our Democratic Senate majority.
These results confirmed what we heard from voters all across the country during the midterms. People want leaders who will work for them to secure progress on the most important issues affecting their lives — like voting rights, reproductive freedom, a livable wage, and so much more.
Since day one, Rev. Warnock has been an incredible advocate for the people of Georgia. Voters didn’t just reward that service. They sent a message that they will not embrace extreme and divisive politics. **This victory is not only a win for Georgia — it’s a win for the future of our democracy.**
I look forward to working alongside him in the U.S. Senate to continue fighting for families and working Americans.
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this possible.
Peter Welch

---
| [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22nov-postelection?refcode=em_20221208_n_p_warnock&refcode2=1217_61531_ryTuQo&akid=1217%2E61531%2EryTuQo)
---
---

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: VICTORY in Georgia -- thanks to environmental activists like you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
(TIME SENSITIVE)? ? ? ? ? 3X MATCH ACTIVE: Help us defeat Big Oil this November >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Peter ? this is bad ? really bad. We've just received word that a major right-wing Super PAC has dropped $5 million into the Arizona Senate race, where Senator Mark Kelly is up against venture capital executive Blake Masters.

Mark Kelly is an environmental champion who just helped secure the most significant climate investment in history. Blake Masters is a climate change denier who's backed by white supremacists.

This move follows a poll that puts the race within two points. Masters' political backers see a window to swing this Senate race, and they've jumped on it. What's more: the same Super PAC has spent millions on the Senate race in Georgia for Herschel Walker to defeat Senator Raphael Warnock.

Peter: Bottom line, we need your help. Environmental field operations are still underfunded, and a group of donors has put together an emergency match fund to triple every contribution. We have to move now or we could lose these races.

Your support is needed to secure important wins from climate candidates in November. TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT when you make a gift of any amount ? even $5 makes a difference >>> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_

We have a goal to knock on 161,875 doors in Arizona, and a total of 1.17 million doors in critical swing states including Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. And we have digital ads running in support of dozens of pro-environmental candidates, which we'll continue leading up to the election.

Study after study shows that speaking with voters through field organizing is the best way to connect with voters about where candidates stand on critical issues ? and get them to turn out on Election Day.

We're scaling up on-the-ground canvassing operations, getting folks to sign commit-to-vote cards, and helping them sign up to vote by mail. And we're encouraging voters to commit to reminding three friends or family members to vote, a tactic called "Vote Tripling."

We're looking for fellow environmentalists like you, Peter, to help us continue our canvassing efforts and get pro-climate candidates elected in November. Can you chip in?

Every single vote counts. Please, pitch in ? ANY amount can really make a difference right now, even if it's just $5. This could be the difference between ensuring an environmental majority or setting us back indefinitely >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Help defeat Blake Masters and the other Big Oil candidates running this election cycle. Our future depends on it.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund

** NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW
------------------------------------------------------------

** In this episode of The Latino Vote podcast, guest speaker Carlos Odio of Equis Labs discusses the midterm elections and the latest Latino politics.
------------------------------------------------------------
Play Episode Now (https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-latino-vote-episode-24-ft-carlos-odio/id1613279254?i=1000588849646)
Today's Headlines:

DCCC upped spending on Latino voters.Was it enough? (https://news.google.com/__i/rss/rd/articles/CBMicmh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lm5iY25ld3MuY29tL25ld3MvbGF0aW5vL2hvdXNlLWRlbW9jcmF0cy1jYW1wYWlnbi1hcm0tdXBwZWQtc3BlbmRpbmctYWltZWQtbGF0aW5vcy13YXMtZW5vdWdoLXJjbmE1OTkwMdIBKmh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lm5iY25ld3MuY29tL25ld3MvYW1wL3JjbmE1OTkwMQ?oc=5) - NBC News

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fd001c58093429898e6feb389692a10&_e=Vzup47pTOQf6MMf0MiFc8BW1O4L6vA2RrkhG5I5FjF-u4-QBOuRP_Bf3F5qP2QgRCxoKGWFQ5wWg2nsoXwL0TlTFgManEIDGye6AB2-mt6QfmW2ixLTekpT6RpCgvjBe-X4vc4LHTDZnKu0Z24LXrHQYF25uqTMFsILEr5caFcQkcvezt5xx9L0XwQzF6xUQB0MZha_doPsc8UkS6Lb1qur-t8xFG6jhQz0lpYNehnQNLGyS_VkHhH5IrjmXjo4XqLz-fBLIEWEx0pHC_oEnC45BH3vJI-rjv0pD06fFPBazn-MSwLcvuY_0KjhfRFb5) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fd001c58093429898e6feb389692a10&_e=Vzup47pTOQf6MMf0MiFc8BW1O4L6vA2RrkhG5I5FjF-u4-QBOuRP_Bf3F5qP2QgRCxoKGWFQ5wWg2nsoXwL0TlTFgManEIDGye6AB2-mt6QfmW2ixLTekpT6RpCgvjBe-X4vc4LHTDZnKu0Z24LXrHQYF25uqTMFsILEr5caFcRSTwiVubndLVVssBWSEdIhyU_A13RoTnhLaNHFVbHp-kVxwI-PdhLESBYSNRM69xnmfO65ZOVt2JElenyPYvwPIbEUsfq4MHsqSvNjcSTgeSKn2NEw_4ugAauEqMid4wCWWRz-SYr03oWcqPnl8jie)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):
* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fd001c58093429898e6feb389692a10&_e=Vzup47pTOQf6MMf0MiFc8BW1O4L6vA2RrkhG5I5FjF-u4-QBOuRP_Bf3F5qP2QgRCxoKGWFQ5wWg2nsoXwL0TlTFgManEIDGye6AB2-mt6QfmW2ixLTekpT6RpCgvjBe-X4vc4LHTDZnKu0Z24LXrHQYF25uqTMFsILEr5caFcTsLJOxsUKr_EvYcGbl3LMayqPxLlpzr3gKucVLHVHmdZMBxHVcF8HuupkfWcHta2VN3gj0lBfc5qHEPkBMLEJZfJjicHz6xPmpEIzF-6g0AIFIH0HxwlFan2IV0HkN1-VQaYqRDw_DyRfGJ_dxG2KK)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fd001c58093429898e6feb389692a10&_e=Vzup47pTOQf6MMf0MiFc8BW1O4L6vA2RrkhG5I5FjF-u4-QBOuRP_Bf3F5qP2QgRCxoKGWFQ5wWg2nsoXwL0TlTFgManEIDGye6AB2-mt6QfmW2ixLTekpT6RpCgvjBe-X4vc4LHTDZnKu0Z24LXrHQYF25uqTMFsILEr5caFcQge_wqa9XvhRggarr4gtQMMJPIYa7fn_PXKbG4kbUR24EPJFKrkslMebJ9JFycXFlOycPpu1PkpRFIR5Fyw2JrdjEicPZW_C7Vaw4Wk_NSNcPuRaWHU4qyU3rTPzDUG4PMvC63rLbWbYK2Idhc-7Nl)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4fd001c58093429898e6feb389692a10&_e=Vzup47pTOQf6MMf0MiFc8BW1O4L6vA2RrkhG5I5FjF-u4-QBOuRP_Bf3F5qP2QgRCxoKGWFQ5wWg2nsoXwL0TlTFgManEIDGye6AB2-mt6QfmW2ixLTekpT6RpCgvjBe-X4vc4LHTDZnKu0Z24LXrHQYF25uqTMFsILEr5caFcSkdzrtKm-KphIvoOy8_Zyn82DIs6Npz_C7FwHVBAVdAiIbY6RExjeO2uHrVrhusQW3rxrogtvg4IDTcCRT-KSGDUx2bnarh96FL0iJNgCQenipFfGvMqGYHjGbA0EZ3ur_IiZR1637-Hoco5knHwU2)
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: What passing the Respect for Marriage Act means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Friend,

Today, we passed the Respect for Marriage Act , enshrining marriage equality into federal law and prohibiting state officials from discriminating against same-sex and interracial couples – this is a major step in the right direction.

I believe that no one should be discriminated against because of who they are or who they love, and I will always oppose any attempt to roll back full marriage equality for the LGBTQ community.

Legislation like the Respect for Marriage Act are the critical stepping stones to lasting change in our nation, and I am honored to have been able to vote to protect such a fundamental right.

Thank you for your continued support,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#]Friend, Today, we passed the Respect for Marriage Act , enshrining marriage equality into federal law and prohibiting state officials from discriminating against same-sex and interracial couples – this is a major step in the right direction. I believe that no one should be discriminated against because of who they are or who they love, and I will always oppose any attempt to roll back full marriage equality for the LGBTQ community. Legislation like the Respect for Marriage Act are the critical stepping stones to lasting change in our nation, and I am honored to have been able to vote to protect such a fundamental right. Thank you for your continued support, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
This is how we can secure Republican priorities without a majority | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0938cdefcb&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter --

It is the holiday season and there is NO better way to get into the giving mood than giving Washington state a chance to restore Safety, return affordability, and bring accountability back to our state Government!

Let's Go Washington has been gathering signatures to get ELEVEN different initiatives on the 2023 ballot. As we know, when it comes to Initiatives - Republican Priorities often WIN with the voters! **> >>We only have until December 31st to [gather signatures](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=58149ad95b&e=6a281f566d) <<<**
---
| [Learn More about the 11 Different Initiatives](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5823b0faa7&e=6a281f566d "Learn More about the 11 Different Initiatives")

---
| If you can't make it to a signing location, you can [request a form be sent to you](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=98e00e9386&e=6a281f566d) \- sign it and gather signatures from friends and family over the holidays and send it back by December 23rd so they are received in time for the December 31st deadline!

---
| We won't have a legislative majority in the 2023 session, but **we can still make a SUBSTANTIAL difference in Washington's future. **

I encourage you to check out all the initiatives at [www.letsgowa.com](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=12455859dd&e=6a281f566d), then sign and submit your signature at a signing location near you - encourage your family and friends to do so as well!

Thanks for your support,

Caleb Heimlich

name: Team Evergreen
subject: IRAirl: Small-scale solar is booming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
See the IRA shine ☀️
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4374?t=2&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv) | The Inflation Reduction Act was a massive climate win... but now that it's law, how is it actually changing our country and building our clean energy future? Our new series showcases exactly how the Inflation Reduction Act is taking effect across the country. No matter where you live, this monumental law is providing real, tangible benefits to you and your community in Pennsylvania. **We fought hard for this. Now, let's meet the Inflation Reduction Act..._in real life._**
---
Friend, have you thought about going solar? You'd be in good company: A surge of Americans across the country are taking advantage of the IRA's new programs and incentives and installing panels like never before. Check out this critical impact and more in the latest edition of **IRA _irl._**
* * *
**__The Latest Critical Impact:_ Small-scale solar is booming _**
For months, IRA investments have given a major lift to America's solar manufacturing industry. Now, consumers are getting in on the IRA's benefits for solar projects in their own backyards.
IRA solar incentives are...
* [_Saving electricity costs at a feed mill in Griggsville, Illinois_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4389?t=3&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_Empowering Houston residents to install rooftop solar at discounted prices_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4390?t=4&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_Kicking the solar industry into overdrive in Maryland_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4391?t=5&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_Expanding solar cost-accessibility for homeowners in New York_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4392?t=6&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)

These are just some of the most recent communities to reap the benefits of solar savings—all from projects that wouldn't exist without the IRA.
Americans clearly understand that clean energy is more reliable and cost-effective, and thanks to the IRA, more and more finally have the opportunity to opt in.
* * *
**__Quick Hits:_ The Inflation Reduction Act is providing..._**
* [_Incentives that prompted two companies to commit to building massive solar factories in the U.S._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4393?t=7&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_$487 billion for a lab developing better battery technology_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4394?t=8&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_$250 billion for the Department of Energy to make dirty energy systems clean_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4395?t=9&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_Confidence for General Motors that electric vehicles will be just as profitable as gas-powered competitors by 2025_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4396?t=10&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_A “wall of opportunity” for energy investors_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4397?t=11&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)
* [_The chance for wind to expand in Milwaukee_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4398?t=12&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv)

Have no doubt: Our clean energy future is coming together right here, right now.
Shine on,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=13141%2E53494%2ElwqdPv). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2022 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

name: =?utf-8?Q?Liz=20Dessauer?=
subject: Spartz will make U.S. Senate decision in January-February
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/spartzwinsdebate-16451232?e=57d5bacdc3)
---
| |
---
| | **Spartz will make U.S. Senate decision in January-February**
---
| | Fellow Hoosiers,

It has been an honor serving you for the last two years in Congress. I also look forward to serving the Fifth Congressional District for the next two years in a Republican Majority. As you know, one of Indiana’s U.S. Senate seats will become open in 2024, and I have been asked to consider it. It’s a great honor serving the people but it’s also an enormous responsibility and hard work to deliver results.

I have been involved in Republican politics for over a decade now and won a lot of tough battles for the people and our freedoms. I came to Washington, D.C. two years ago and planned to serve for not more than 6 years, three terms, in the U.S. House of Representatives. I love our Republic dearly and understand how important these times are for our nation, but I need to decide if I am ready to commit at least 8 more years to Washington D.C. As some of you might know, I am not a huge fan of it. We know the Senate is failing us as an institution that is supposed to represent the interest of the States and provide long-term policy solutions. It definitely could use more real people from the ground, not more DC creatures, but it’s a huge undertaking to make it better. I have to decide how and where I can bring the most value and will let you know for sure in January-February of next year.

Regardless of what I do next, Indiana already made history electing a girl from a poor, socialist town with no running water to become a U.S. Congresswoman. My life is a testament that the American dream is still alive and well, but no doubt it’s under siege.

###
---
| | Contact: Liz Dessauer
liz@spartzforcongress.com
---

body:
We couldn’t have done it without you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732267/382615490/294255004?refcode=EM_FR_221208WarnockVictory_N_CAUCUS_30DO_5_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4ZDQ0NC00Yzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ARbu55QTNSwblxkHg32onWsWZaY6XTM0l5X2GGR9EA=) Peter,

From the moment Reverend Warnock was elected, GOP strategists had already lined him up as a target in the 2022 midterms. Contrary to all the pundits’ expectations, Reverend Warnock was resoundingly reelected with an almost 100,000 vote margin. Georgia Democrats turned out big time when it mattered most, and we just expanded our Democratic U.S. Senate majority to 51-49. That’s a big deal, Peter, and we couldn’t have accomplished a feat like this without your support. [**_Now, we’re asking our most loyal supporters who pushed us over the top to join us in celebrating by signing Senator Warnock’s victory card. Will you add your name today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732268/382615498/-1333330748?refcode=EM_FR_221208WarnockVictory_N_CAUCUS_30DO_5_NG_TESTB_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4ZDQ0NC00Yzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ARbu55QTNSwblxkHg32onWsWZaY6XTM0l5X2GGR9EA=&emci=9478d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=9978d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=16273785) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732270/382615506/-1333330748?refcode=EM_FR_221208WarnockVictory_N_CAUCUS_30DO_5_NG_TESTB_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4ZDQ0NC00Yzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ARbu55QTNSwblxkHg32onWsWZaY6XTM0l5X2GGR9EA=&emci=9478d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=9978d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=16273785) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55732272/382615515/-1333330748?refcode=EM_FR_221208WarnockVictory_N_CAUCUS_30DO_5_NG_TESTB_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4ZDQ0NC00Yzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ARbu55QTNSwblxkHg32onWsWZaY6XTM0l5X2GGR9EA=&emci=9478d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=9978d444-4c77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=16273785) With his reelection secured, Senator Warnock will provide Georgia Democrats leadership and guidance for at least 6 more years and serve as a shining example of what Democratic leadership can do for this state. Senator Warnock will provide a huge boost to our efforts in flipping the Georgia legislature blue. That’s something to celebrate, Peter.

Now that he isn’t in campaign mode, Senator Warnock will be reinvigorated, heading back to D.C. to solve problems for Georgia and his constituents. There is no stronger voice in Congress on healthcare, reproductive rights, voting rights, and an equitable economy than Senator Warnock, and we are so lucky to have him as our Senator for the foreseeable future. We’re not going to rest on our laurels, but we feel that something like this deserves a victory celebration.

[**_Sign Senator Warnock’s victory card today to let him know that you were a part of the team that made it all possible. clean_body: We couldn’t have done it without you. = Peter, From the moment Reverend Warnock was elected, GOP strategists had already lined him up as a target in the 2022 midterms. Contrary to all the pundits’ expectations, Reverend Warnock was resoundingly reelected with an almost 100,000 vote margin. Georgia Democrats turned out big time when it mattered most, and we just expanded our Democratic U.S. Senate majority to 51-49. That’s a big deal, Peter, and we couldn’t have accomplished a feat like this without your support. With his reelection secured, Senator Warnock will provide Georgia Democrats leadership and guidance for at least 6 more years and serve as a shining example of what Democratic leadership can do for this state. Senator Warnock will provide a huge boost to our efforts in flipping the Georgia legislature blue. That’s something to celebrate, Peter. Now that he isn’t in campaign mode, Senator Warnock will be reinvigorated, heading back to D.C. to solve problems for Georgia and his constituents. There is no stronger voice in Congress on healthcare, reproductive rights, voting rights, and an equitable economy than Senator Warnock, and we are so lucky to have him as our Senator for the foreseeable future. We’re not going to rest on our laurels, but we feel that something like this deserves a victory celebration. Gracious in victory, Georgia House Democrats | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. body:
I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | |
---
I love talking directly with Democrats like you, Derek -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. **If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team.** **I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. clean_body: I love talking directly with Democrats like you -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. | | I love talking directly with Democrats like you, Derek -- about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what got you in this fight. So you can imagine how excited I am about the Democratic National Committee connecting me with supporters like you. If you chip in $7 today, you won’t just help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- you could be one of the donors I call to personally thank for being a part of this incredible team. I’d love to get the chance to talk with you, Derek. Chip in $7 -- or whatever you can -- to the DNC today. We’ve got to keep electing Democrats at every level who are committed to making progress, and the DNC’s work is crucial to that goal. The DNC is making historic investments in state parties, on-the-ground organizing, and protecting the right to vote. Truth be told, none of it will be possible without your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on our team. Hopefully, we’ll get to talk more soon -- it’d be the highlight of my week. Joe Joseph R. Hey team,

2022 was not the Red Wave we predicted. We lost our grip. We failed to Take Back the Senate and will pay the price in the coming months.

[**_Chip in to put the GOP back on track in the new year. We are desperate._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ca7754a385964b06ae8872a4957f233d&_e=zpNycIRuo-C8ymvzqh_TDJAAiGeVda1R6W_lEDw3z_WfuYpwAKa9R3dba4HKcpzGNhkDwQZ7mbMt-oUDWNwKbnttDLWfVbt_CCJflSwd5picTVRsxZkoLDhIptXa9EKOARchpv3VCxhR6ZJ1BPoC42TPYUjIxNnCKFNySAviy8MkOHs2ykGppNcqxA6iLoXlouzswxxkpT52SWNoMCB50INIr00brYwigyRT4qdOOXrF6vVWLkoGRSKs68-9uxbvMXPiYU8DPg-yGifWOPOeQWh9zOzHX7vL-Mrn6-Klwj5L9N9Ltl0UgIkCP4MJZqYlDCKriEN-U7n6t570eJOY8uXqBBt97FnpDTJB3bxrn8cvEyFBHf6UYHNY6atCVNLavwrN0a44ApAoBY-GX9Z7XgImUDufeiiin1xb9ZmAxCHpP8Oyf_N8_XVSFcPE32E9A3K2gUI1MeqbJOlvOAdivTUaWZO_6ThGFGwOQZq71rc%3D)

❌ The Left was able to handily outraise us.
❌ They were able to expand their Senate Majority.
❌ They were able to mobilize a bigger voter turnout.

We have work to do. This cannot go on. **_And the work we put in NOW will help us next year and in 2024. We cannot let this happen again._**

So I have one question for you:

[**What are you going to do about it? Help JD fight back and put America back on the right track. Rush a donation NOW!**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ca7754a385964b06ae8872a4957f233d&_e=zpNycIRuo-C8ymvzqh_TDJAAiGeVda1R6W_lEDw3z_WfuYpwAKa9R3dba4HKcpzGNhkDwQZ7mbMt-oUDWNwKbnttDLWfVbt_CCJflSwd5picTVRsxZkoLDhIptXa9EKOARchpv3VCxhR6ZJ1BPoC42TPYUjIxNnCKFNySAviy8MkOHs2ykGppNcqxA6iLoXlouzswxxkpT52SWNoMCB50INIr00brYwigyRT4qdOOXrF6vVWLkoGRSKs68-9uxbvMXPiYU8DPg-yGifWOPOeQWh9zOzHX7vL-Mrn6-Klwj5L9N9Ltl0UgIkCP4MJZqYlDCKriEN-U7n6t570eJOY8g5Bgu63BZL-YJeUzGkzkHVT6kJXpzv8XkgOc-vXdhXb0KOm9lHGEzSjxpFKjYRwD-ZWEL1-Q0h_86oo_EKYGZlpi0zagYz-cAoHLkeBnWtS2ngn4ZYBz_zTu474cgcJA991-vY4qvHnTqMXWf0if_A%3D)

We have no other choice than to unite.

November may have been grim, but we can only move forward and build back the Republican party for 2024.

Let’s get to work — there’s no time to waste!

Thank you,

Team Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

Peter – this was a BIG week for Democrats. We secured an outright Democratic Senate Majority and we couldn’t be happier!

Now, if we’re going to take full advantage of our new Majority, _we need to rethink our Democratic strategy before the new year._ Unfortunately, all of the data we’ve previously collected is now invalid and we need your help.

We’re surveying Democrats nationwide to establish Democratic priorities for 2023 – and as one of our smartest supporters, your response is due at midnight tonight, Peter.

[**We’re counting on you to respond -- it’s critical to ensuring our Majority focuses on the right things. Please, Peter, respond right now »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55732865/382617672/-2105643?refcode=UTS_20221208_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZGI4NjM5LTUwNzctZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Agt-1PjL7eeleUKDXdbGTjDJsOHv2L8gc5kDILEM1J0=&emci=5e3fbf0f-1f77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d5db8639-5077-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=24268976)
